Impact: 存储型跨站脚本攻击。攻击者可上传恶意文件，当其他用户查看附件修订历史时，恶意代码在受害者浏览器中执行。可导致会话劫持、敏感信息窃取、恶意操作等。

Nodes.Desc: 源点：变量 `filename` 通过 `getFileItemAsString()` 接收外部输入并成为污点源。代码: `// Try to use the name provided by the user filename = fileupload.getFileItemAsString(filenameField, context); if (!Stri...`
传播点：`fileupload` 经 `replaceAll()` 处理后并入 `filename`，污点继续向下游传播。 代码: `filename = fileupload.getFileItemAsString(filenameField, context); if (!StringUtils.isBlank(filename)) { // TODO These s...`

传播点：`InputStream` 经 `getFileItemInputStream()` 处理后并入 `contentInputStream`，污点继续向下游传播。 代码: `InputStream contentInputStream = fileupload.getFileItemInputStream(fieldName, context); attachment = doc.setAttachment(f...`

汇点：调用 `render($attachment)` 触发模板/内容渲染，污点在此触达危险 API。代码: `

$services.localization.render("core.viewers.attachments.revisions", [$attachment.filename])

`

source_to_sink_claim.reason: verifier supports a path that was already validated during mainflow submission

evidence.analysis: 1. 读取UploadAction.java文件，确认第264行获取用户输入的文件名。2. 分析getFileName()方法，确认只验证/、\、;字符，不验证HTML特殊字符。3. 查看uploadAttachment()方法，确认文件名被设置到附件对象。4. 读取viewattachrev.vm模板文件，确认第23行直接输出$attachment.filename到HTML标题中，未使用$escapetool.xml()转义。5. 对比其他模板文件（如extensionHistory.vm），发现正确使用了$escapetool.xml($attachment.filename)进行转义，表明此处是遗漏。
evidence.method: 静态代码分析和数据流追踪。验证了从用户输入到HTML输出的完整数据流路径，确认文件名只验证了/、\、;字符，未进行HTML/XML转义，并在模板中直接输出到HTML标题中。参考CVE-2022-36094确认此漏洞。

poc.description: 攻击者上传一个文件名包含XSS payload的附件，例如：'test<script>alert(document.domain)</script>.txt'。当其他用户访问该附件的修订历史页面（viewattachrev.vm）时，恶意JavaScript代码将在受害者浏览器中执行。
steps: 1. 攻击者登录XWiki系统
2. 上传一个文件，文件名为：test<script>alert(document.domain)</script>.txt
3. 文件名通过验证（不包含/、\、;字符）
4. 文件被成功上传并存储
5. 受害者访问该附件的修订历史页面
6. 页面加载时，文件名直接输出到HTML标题中，触发XSS攻击
poc.harness_code:
由于是存储型XSS，需要完整的应用环境进行测试。但基于代码分析，以下payload可通过验证并触发XSS：
1. test<script>alert(1)</script>.txt
2. test<svg onload=alert(1)>.txt
3. test" onload="alert(1)".txt
4. test' onmouseover='alert(1)'.txt

cve_info.Title: XWiki Platform Web Parent POM vulnerable to XSS in the attachment history
cve_info.Description: XWiki Platform Web Parent POM contains Web resources for the XWiki platform, a generic wiki platform. Starting with version 1.0 and prior to versions 13.10.6 and 14.30-rc-1, it's possible to store JavaScript which will be executed by anyone viewing the history of an attachment containing javascript in its name. This issue has been patched in XWiki 13.10.6 and 14.3RC1. As a workaround, it is possible to replace `viewattachrev.vm`, the entry point for this attack, by a patched version from the patch without updating XWiki.

CWE.Description: CWE-79: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')
CWE-80: Improper Neutralization of Script-Related HTML Tags in a Web Page (Basic XSS)

PatchInfo.Message: XWIKI-19612: XSS in the attachment history

basic_info.title: Ssrf in DatabaseTypeService.java
basic_info.description:
在DriverResources.download()方法中，driverFileUrl参数直接传递给restTemplate.execute()和new URL()，没有进行任何验证或过滤。攻击者可以控制driverFileUrl参数，使其指向内部服务（如127.0.0.1:8080/admin），导致服务器端请求伪造(SSRF)攻击。此外，当下载失败时，错误信息可能泄露敏感信息（如内部服务响应）。

Impact: 攻击者可以：1. 扫描内部网络服务；2. 访问内部管理接口；3. 读取本地文件(file://协议)；4. 访问云元数据服务；5. 可能的身份验证绕过或信息泄露

cve_info.Title: Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) vulnerability in Databasir
cve_info.Description: Databasir is a database metadata management platform. Databasir <= 1.06 has Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) vulnerability. The SSRF is triggered by a sending a **single** HTTP POST request to create a databaseType. By supplying a `jdbcDriverFileUrl` that returns a non `200` response code, the url is executed, the response is logged (both in terminal and in database) and is included in the response. This would allow an attackers to obtain the real IP address and scan Intranet information. This issue was fixed in version 1.0.7.

CWE.Description: CWE-918: Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF)

PatchInfo.Message: fix: security vulnerability SSRF (#256)

basic_info.title: Path Traversal in FileUploadRequest.java
basic_info.description:
在DSpace JSPUI的FileUploadRequest和SubmissionController中发现了多个路径遍历漏洞。用户控制的输入（filename, resumableIdentifier, resumableChunkNumber）被直接拼接到文件路径中，没有进行规范化检查或验证。攻击者可以通过包含'../'序列的输入将文件写入到临时目录之外的任意位置，可能导致任意文件写入、覆盖系统文件、甚至远程代码执行。CVE-20

Impact: 攻击者可利用此漏洞将任意文件写入系统任意位置，可能导致：1) 覆盖系统关键文件（如/etc/passwd、/etc/shadow）；2) 写入web根目录实现远程代码执行；3) 写入SSH授权密钥实现未授权访问；4) 写入crontab实现持久化后门。

findings.title: Path Traversal in FileUploadRequest.java
findings.description:
在DSpace JSPUI的FileUploadRequest和SubmissionController中发现了多个路径遍历漏洞。用户控制的输入（filename, resumableIdentifier, resumableChunkNumber）被直接拼接到文件路径中，没有进行规范化检查或验证。攻击者可以通过包含'../'序列的输入将文件写入到临时目录之外的任意位置，可能导致任意文件写入、覆盖系统文件、甚至远程代码执行。CVE-20

Impact: 攻击者可利用此漏洞将任意文件写入系统任意位置，可能导致：1) 覆盖系统关键文件（如/etc/passwd、/etc/shadow）；2) 写入web根目录实现远程代码执行；3) 写入SSH授权密钥实现未授权访问；4) 写入crontab实现持久化后门。

Nodes.Desc: 源点：变量 `resumableIdentifier` 通过 `getParameter()` 接收外部输入并成为污点源。代码: `String resumableIdentifier = request.getParameter("resumableIdentifier"); String resumableChunkNumber = request.getParam...`
传播点：`File` 的值在此参与赋值到 `tempDir`，污点继续传递。代码: `tempDir = tempDir + File.separator + resumableIdentifier;`
传播点：`String` 的值在此参与赋值到 `chunkPath`，污点继续传递。代码: `String chunkPath = tempDir + File.separator + "part" + resumableChunkNumber;`

汇点：调用 `createNewFile()` 触发危险操作，污点在此被利用。代码: `destFile.createNewFile();`

source_to_sink_claim.reason: verifier supports a path that was already validated during mainflow submission

evidence.analysis: 通过编写Java Fuzzing Harness测试代码，模拟了多个路径遍历场景。测试证实：1) resumableFilename参数可包含'../'序列，导致文件写入临时目录之外（如/etc/passwd、/root/.ssh/authorized_keys）；2) resumableIdentifier参数可包含'../'序列，导致目录创建在临时目录之外；3) resumableChunkNumber参数可包含路径遍历序列。所有测试均成功验证了漏洞可利用性。
evidence.method: 动态Fuzzing测试 + 静态代码分析

poc.description: 通过控制resumableFilename参数实现任意文件写入
steps: 1. 向文件上传端点发送HTTP请求，设置resumableFilename参数为'../../../../etc/passwd'
2. 系统将拼接路径：tempDir + File.separator + '../../../../etc/passwd'
3. 文件将被写入/etc/passwd而不是临时目录
poc.payload:
HTTP请求示例：
POST /submit/upload HTTP/1.1
Content-Type: multipart/form-data

resumableIdentifier=malicious&resumableFilename=../../../../etc/passwd&resumableChunkNumber=1

cve_info.Title: Path traversal vulnerabilities in DSpace JSPUI submission upload
cve_info.Description: DSpace open source software is a repository application which provides durable access to digital resources. dspace-jspui is a UI component for DSpace. The JSPUI resumable upload implementations in SubmissionController and FileUploadRequest are vulnerable to multiple path traversal attacks, allowing an attacker to create files/directories anywhere on the server writable by the Tomcat/DSpace user, by modifying some request parameters during submission. This path traversal can only be executed by a user with special privileges (submitter rights). This vulnerability only impacts the JSPUI. Users are advised to upgrade. There are no known workarounds. However, this vulnerability cannot be exploited by an anonymous user or a basic user. The user must first have submitter privileges to at least one Collection and be able to determine how to modify the request parameters to exploit the vulnerability.

CWE.Description: CWE-22: Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal')

PatchInfo.Message: [DS-4132] Fix JSPUI resumable upload path traversal

basic_info.title: Open Redirect in ControlledVocabularyServlet.java
basic_info.description:
在ControlledVocabularyServlet.java中，callerUrl参数直接从HTTP请求获取并用于response.sendRedirect()，没有任何验证或过滤。攻击者可以构造恶意URL，将用户重定向到任意网站，用于钓鱼攻击或其他恶意目的。

Impact: 攻击者可以利用此漏洞进行钓鱼攻击，诱骗用户访问恶意网站，可能导致：1. 用户凭证被盗（如登录信息）；2. 恶意软件下载；3. 会话劫持；4. 跨站请求伪造（CSRF）攻击。由于重定向可能指向JavaScript URL，还可能执行任意JavaScript代码。

findings.title: Open Redirect in ControlledVocabularyServlet.java
findings.description:
在ControlledVocabularyServlet.java中，callerUrl参数直接从HTTP请求获取并用于response.sendRedirect()，没有任何验证或过滤。攻击者可以构造恶意URL，将用户重定向到任意网站，用于钓鱼攻击或其他恶意目的。

Impact: 攻击者可以利用此漏洞进行钓鱼攻击，诱骗用户访问恶意网站，可能导致：1. 用户凭证被盗（如登录信息）；2. 恶意软件下载；3. 会话劫持；4. 跨站请求伪造（CSRF）攻击。由于重定向可能指向JavaScript URL，还可能执行任意JavaScript代码。

Nodes.Desc: 源点：变量 `callerUrl` 通过 `getParameter()` 接收外部输入并成为污点源。代码: `String callerUrl = request.getParameter("callerUrl");`
传播点：`request` 经 `getParameter()` 处理后并入 `ID`，污点继续向下游传播。 代码: `if (request.getParameter("ID") != null) { ID = request.getParameter("ID"); } if (request.getParameter("filter") != null)...`
汇点：调用 `sendRedirect(callerUrl)` 触发危险操作，污点在此触达危险 API。代码: `response.sendRedirect(callerUrl);`

source_to_sink_claim.reason: verifier supports a path that was already validated during mainflow submission

evidence.analysis: 1. 读取文件dspace-jspui/src/main/java/org/dspace/app/webui/servlet/ControlledVocabularyServlet.java，确认文件存在且代码与描述一致。2. 分析doDSGet方法（第31-54行），发现callerUrl参数直接从request.getParameter("callerUrl")获取（第38行）。3. 确认callerUrl变量直接传递给response.sendRedirect(callerUrl)（第53行），中间没有任何验证、过滤或白名单检查。4. doDSPost方法（第56-62行）也调用doDSGet，因此POST请求同样存在漏洞。5. 使用code_analysis工具进行深度分析，确认这是一个未经验证的重定向漏洞，严重程度为critical。
evidence.method: 静态代码分析结合数据流追踪，确认callerUrl参数从request.getParameter()获取后直接传递给response.sendRedirect()，没有任何验证、过滤或白名单检查。code_analysis工具也确认了这是一个未经验证的重定向漏洞。

poc.description: 攻击者可以构造包含恶意callerUrl参数的URL，当用户访问时会被重定向到攻击者控制的钓鱼网站。
steps: 1. 找到使用ControlledVocabularyServlet的页面或功能
2. 在URL中添加callerUrl参数，指向恶意网站，例如：http://target.com/controlledvocabulary?callerUrl=http://evil.com/phishing
3. 诱使用户点击该链接
4. 用户访问后会被重定向到http://evil.com/phishing

cve_info.Title: URL Redirection to Untrusted Site in Dspace JSPUI
cve_info.Description: DSpace open source software is a repository application which provides durable access to digital resources. dspace-jspui is a UI component for DSpace. The JSPUI controlled vocabulary servlet is vulnerable to an open redirect attack, where an attacker can craft a malicious URL that looks like a legitimate DSpace/repository URL. When that URL is clicked by the target, it redirects them to a site of the attacker's choice. This issue has been patched in versions 5.11 and 6.4. Users are advised to upgrade. There are no known workaround for this vulnerability.

CWE.Description: CWE-601: URL Redirection to Untrusted Site ('Open Redirect')

PatchInfo.Message: [DS-4133] Improve URL handling in Controlled Vocab JSPUI servlet

basic_info.title: Xss in RequestItemServlet.java
basic_info.description:
The JSPUI 'Request a Copy' feature does not properly escape user-supplied values submitted through the request form. Parameters 'reqname', 'email', 'coment', 'subject', and 'message' are retrieved from HTTP requests with

Impact: 攻击者可以构造恶意请求，在'Request a Copy'功能中注入JavaScript代码。当用户(包括管理员)查看请求表单或批准页面时，恶意脚本将在其浏览器中执行，可能导致会话劫持、敏感信息窃取、恶意重定向等攻击。由于该功能涉及文件请求和审批流程，可能被特权用户访问，增加了攻击影响。

findings.title: Xss in RequestItemServlet.java
findings.description:
The JSPUI 'Request a Copy' feature does not properly escape user-supplied values submitted through the request form. Parameters 'reqname', 'email', 'coment', 'subject', and 'message' are retrieved from HTTP requests with

Impact: 攻击者可以构造恶意请求，在'Request a Copy'功能中注入JavaScript代码。当用户(包括管理员)查看请求表单或批准页面时，恶意脚本将在其浏览器中执行，可能导致会话劫持、敏感信息窃取、恶意重定向等攻击。由于该功能涉及文件请求和审批流程，可能被特权用户访问，增加了攻击影响。

Nodes.Desc: 源点：变量 `reqname` 通过 `getParameter()` 接收外部输入并成为污点源。代码: `String reqname = request.getParameter("reqname");`
传播点：数据在 `setAttribute()` 调用链中继续传递/变换。代码: `request.setAttribute("reqname", reqname);`
汇点：污点数据在此进入危险执行路径。代码: `<input class="form-control" type="text" name="reqname" size="50" value="<%= userName %>">`
Nodes.code: <input class="form-control" type="text" name="reqname" size="50" value="<%= userName %>">

Nodes.Desc: 源点：变量 `coment` 通过 `getParameter()` 接收外部输入并成为污点源。代码: `String coment = request.getParameter("coment");`
传播点：数据在 `setAttribute()` 调用链中继续传递/变换。代码: `request.setAttribute("coment", coment);`
汇点：污点数据在此进入危险执行路径。代码: `<textarea class="form-control" name="coment" rows="6" cols="46" wrap=soft><%= coment %></textarea>`
Nodes.code: <textarea class="form-control" name="coment" rows="6" cols="46" wrap=soft><%= coment %></textarea>

Nodes.Desc: 源点：变量 `subject` 通过 `getParameter()` 接收外部输入并成为污点源。代码: `String subject = request.getParameter("subject"); String message = request.getParameter("message");`
Nodes.code:
String subject = request.getParameter("subject");
                String message = request.getParameter("message");

Nodes.Desc: 汇点：污点数据在此进入危险执行路径。代码: `<input type="text" class="form-control" name="subject" value='<%= subject %>' />`
汇点：污点数据在此进入危险执行路径。代码: `<textarea class="form-control" name="message" rows="20" cols="100"><%= message %></textarea>`

source_to_sink_claim.reason: verifier supports a path that was already validated during mainflow submission

evidence.analysis: 1. 确认文件存在并读取相关代码行。2. 分析RequestItemServlet.java中的processForm和processAttach方法，发现多个参数(reqname, coment, subject, message)通过request.getParameter()获取。3. 这些参数通过request.setAttribute()存储到请求属性中。4. 在JSP文件(request-form.jsp和request-letter.jsp)中，这些属性使用<%= variable %>直接输出到HTML标签属性值和内容中。5. <%= %>表达式不进行HTML编码，导致用户输入中的HTML特殊字符和JavaScript代码被浏览器解析执行。6. 编写Java测试代码模拟JSP渲染，验证XSS payload如<script>alert('XSS')</script>能够原样输出到生成的HTML中，构成XSS漏洞。
evidence.method: 静态代码分析结合动态Fuzzing测试。通过读取源代码确认用户输入参数(reqname, coment, subject, message)从HTTP请求获取，通过request.setAttribute存储，并在JSP页面中使用<%= %>直接输出到HTML中，没有进行HTML编码。编写Java测试代码模拟JSP渲染行为，验证XSS payload能够原样输出到HTML中。

poc.description: 反射型XSS漏洞，攻击者可以构造恶意请求，在'Request a Copy'表单中注入JavaScript代码，当用户访问相关页面时执行恶意脚本。
steps: 1. 访问DSpace的'Request a Copy'功能页面
2. 在'Your Name'字段输入: <script>alert('XSS')</script>
3. 提交表单，当表单验证失败或重新显示时，恶意脚本将在浏览器中执行
4. 对于subject和message参数，需要在请求批准流程中注入
poc.payload: 恶意输入示例: 1. reqname参数: 2. reqname参数: " onmouseover="alert('XSS')" 3. coment参数:

cve_info.Title: Cross Site Scripting possible in DSpace JSPUI "Request a Copy" feature
cve_info.Description: DSpace open source software is a repository application which provides durable access to digital resources. dspace-jspui is a UI component for DSpace. The JSPUI "Request a Copy" feature does not properly escape values submitted and stored from the "Request a Copy" form. This means that item requests could be vulnerable to XSS attacks. This vulnerability only impacts the JSPUI. Users are advised to upgrade. There are no known workarounds for this vulnerability.

CWE.Description: CWE-79: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')

PatchInfo.Message: [DS-4133] Improve URL handling in Controlled Vocab JSPUI servlet

basic_info.title: Path Traversal in InternalTemplateManager.java
basic_info.description:
在InternalTemplateManager.java的getClassloaderTemplate方法中，templateName参数与固定前缀'templates/'直接拼接，未进行路径规范化检查。攻击者可以通过在templateName中注入'../'序列，跳出'templates/'目录限制，访问类路径中的任意文件，如WEB-INF/web.xml、配置文件等敏感资源。该漏洞对应CVE-2022-29253，补丁已修复此问题

Impact: 攻击者可以通过构造恶意templateName参数，访问类路径中的任意文件，包括：1. WEB-INF/web.xml（应用配置）2. WEB-INF/classes/*.properties（数据库凭证等敏感配置）3. 其他类路径中的敏感资源文件。这可能导致敏感信息泄露，为进一步攻击提供信息。

findings.title: Path Traversal in InternalTemplateManager.java
findings.description:
在InternalTemplateManager.java的getClassloaderTemplate方法中，templateName参数与固定前缀'templates/'直接拼接，未进行路径规范化检查。攻击者可以通过在templateName中注入'../'序列，跳出'templates/'目录限制，访问类路径中的任意文件，如WEB-INF/web.xml、配置文件等敏感资源。该漏洞对应CVE-2022-29253，补丁已修复此问题

Impact: 攻击者可以通过构造恶意templateName参数，访问类路径中的任意文件，包括：1. WEB-INF/web.xml（应用配置）2. WEB-INF/classes/*.properties（数据库凭证等敏感配置）3. 其他类路径中的敏感资源文件。这可能导致敏感信息泄露，为进一步攻击提供信息。

Nodes.Desc: 源点：变量 `template` 通过 `getTemplate()` 接收外部输入并成为污点源。代码: `public Template getTemplate(String templateName) { Template template = null;`
传播点：`Try` 经 `getClassloaderTemplate()` 处理后并入 `template`，污点继续向下游传播。 代码: `// Try from current Thread classloader if (template == null) { template = getClassloaderTemplate("templates/", templateN...`

汇点：调用 `getClassloaderTemplate(ClassLoader)` 触发危险操作，污点参数被消费（结果写入 `templatePath`）。 代码: `private Template getClassloaderTemplate(ClassLoader classloader, String suffixPath, String templateName) { String templa...`

source_to_sink_claim.reason: verifier supports a path that was already validated during mainflow submission

evidence.analysis: 1. 读取并分析了InternalTemplateManager.java文件，确认getClassloaderTemplate方法中templateName参数与'templates/'直接拼接，没有路径规范化检查。2. 编写Java Fuzzing Harness模拟攻击，验证了当templateName包含'../'序列时，可以跳出templates目录访问敏感文件。3. 对比AbstractResourceSkin.java中的getSkinResourcePath方法，该方法有路径规范化检查，进一步证明漏洞存在。4. 该漏洞对应已知CVE-2022-29253。
evidence.method: 代码静态分析 + Fuzzing Harness动态验证

poc.description: 通过构造恶意templateName参数，利用路径遍历漏洞读取类路径中的敏感文件
steps: 1. 调用getTemplate方法，传入包含'../'的templateName参数
2. 参数通过getClassloaderTemplate('templates/', templateName)传递
3. 在getClassloaderTemplate方法中，templateName与'templates/'拼接
4. 拼接后的路径包含'../'序列，经过规范化后跳出templates目录
5. classloader.getResource()加载类路径中的敏感文件

cve_info.Title: Path Traversal in XWiki Platform
cve_info.Description: XWiki Platform is a generic wiki platform offering runtime services for applications built on top of it. Starting with version 8.3-rc-1 and prior to versions 12.10.3 and 14.0, one can ask for any file located in the classloader using the template API and a path with ".." in it. The issue is patched in versions 14.0 and 13.10.3. There is no easy workaround for this issue.

CWE.Description: CWE-24: Path Traversal: '../filedir'
CWE-22: Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal')

PatchInfo.Message: XWIKI-19349: Bad handling of classloader templates path resolution

basic_info.title: Cross-Site Scripting (Xss) in WebHomeSheet.xml
basic_info.description:
The file WebHomeSheet.xml contains a reflected Cross-site Scripting vulnerability in the create macro. When CSRF token validation fails, the application renders a form with a hidden input field whose value is directly taken from user input without proper escaping.

Impact: 攻击者可构造恶意URL诱导用户点击，在用户浏览器中执行任意JavaScript代码。可导致：1. 窃取用户会话cookie，劫持用户账户。2. 以用户身份执行敏感操作。3. 窃取敏感信息。4. 重定向用户到恶意网站。需要用户交互（点击链接），但结合社工攻击风险较高。

findings.title: Cross-Site Scripting (Xss) in WebHomeSheet.xml
findings.description:
The file WebHomeSheet.xml contains a reflected Cross-site Scripting vulnerability in the create macro. When CSRF token validation fails, the application renders a form with a hidden input field whose value is directly taken from user input without proper escaping.

Impact: 攻击者可构造恶意URL诱导用户点击，在用户浏览器中执行任意JavaScript代码。可导致：1. 窃取用户会话cookie，劫持用户账户。2. 以用户身份执行敏感操作。3. 窃取敏感信息。4. 重定向用户到恶意网站。需要用户交互（点击链接），但结合社工攻击风险较高。

Nodes.Desc: 源点：通过 `create()` 读取外部输入，污点从此进入。代码: `#create()`
传播点：数据在 `elseif()` 调用链中继续传递/变换。代码: `#elseif(!$services.csrf.isTokenValid($request.form_token))`
汇点：污点数据在此进入危险执行路径。代码: `<input type="hidden" name="newThemeName" id="newThemeName" value="$request.newThemeName" />`

source_to_sink_claim.reason: verifier supports a path that was already validated during mainflow submission

evidence.analysis: 1. 确认文件存在且代码与描述一致。2. 分析代码发现第290行直接输出$request.newThemeName到HTML属性value中，没有使用$escapetool.xml()进行转义。3. 对比同一文件其他部分（第296行）正确使用了$escapetool.url()，同一项目其他文件（ThemeSheet.xml）类似场景正确使用了$escapetool.xml()。4. 编写Python Fuzzing Harness模拟漏洞场景，测试多种XSS payload，确认payload会原样输出到HTML中，可触发XSS。
evidence.method: 静态代码分析 + Fuzzing Harness模拟测试

poc.description: 反射型XSS漏洞，当用户访问包含恶意newThemeName参数的URL且CSRF token验证失败时触发
steps: 1. 攻击者构造恶意URL：http://target/xwiki/bin/view/FlamingoThemes/WebHome?action=create&newThemeName=%22+onload%3D%22alert%281%29%22
2. 诱导受害者点击该URL
3. 由于没有提供有效的CSRF token，应用进入CSRF验证失败分支
4. 应用渲染包含隐藏输入字段的表单，将newThemeName参数值直接输出到value属性中
5. 浏览器解析HTML，执行onload事件中的JavaScript代码
poc.payload: 恶意URL示例：http://target/xwiki/bin/view/FlamingoThemes/WebHome?action=create&newThemeName=" onload="alert(document.cookie)" 有效XSS payloads： - " onload="alert(1)" - "> - "> - " autofocus onfocus="alert(1)"
poc.harness_code:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
# XSS Fuzzing Harness for Velocity Template
import html

def simulate_velocity_rendering(newThemeName, csrf_token_valid=False):
    output = []
    if not newThemeName or newThemeName == '':
        return output
    elif not csrf_token_valid:
        vulnerable_line = f'<input type="hidden" name="newThemeName" id="newThemeName" value="{newThemeName}" />'
        output.append(vulnerable_line)
        if '\"' in newThemeName or '>' in newThemeName or '<' in newThemeName:
            output.append("[XSS DETECTED] HTML special characters in value attribute")
    return output

# Test payload
payload = '\" onload=\"alert(1)\"'
print(f"Payload: {payload}")
print(f"Simulated output: {simulate_velocity_rendering(payload, False)}")
print("Expected in browser: <input type='hidden' ... value='\" onload=\"alert(1)\"'>")
print("Result: JavaScript alert(1) would execute when page loads")

cve_info.Title: Cross-site Scripting in the Flamingo theme manager
cve_info.Description: XWiki Platform Flamingo Theme UI is a tool that allows customization and preview of any Flamingo-based skin. Starting with versions 6.2.4 and 6.3-rc-1, a possible cross-site scripting vector is present in the `FlamingoThemesCode.WebHomeSheet` wiki page related to the "newThemeName" form field. The issue is patched in versions 12.10.11, 14.0-rc-1, 13.4.7, and 13.10.3. The easiest available workaround is to edit the wiki page `FlamingoThemesCode.WebHomeSheet` (with wiki editor) according to the suggestion provided in the GitHub Security Advisory.

CWE.Description: CWE-80: Improper Neutralization of Script-Related HTML Tags in a Web Page (Basic XSS)
CWE-116: Improper Encoding or Escaping of Output

PatchInfo.Message: XWIKI-19294: Fix bad escaping

basic_info.title: Remote Code Execution in DatabaseTypeService.java
basic_info.description:
系统允许用户提供任意JDBC驱动文件URL，通过DriverResources.download下载并加载JAR文件，但缺少对JAR文件的验证。攻击者可以提供恶意JAR文件，当系统使用URLClassLoader加载该JAR时，可能执行恶意代码。根据CVE-2022-24861补丁，修复方案是添加validateJar方法验证JAR文件安全性，但当前代码中缺失此验证。

Impact: 高危 - 远程代码执行。攻击者可通过提供恶意JDBC驱动JAR文件URL，在目标服务器上执行任意代码，完全控制服务器。利用条件：1. 攻击者能控制jdbcDriverFileUrl（需要SYS_OWNER权限或通过其他漏洞修改数据库）；2. 系统需要加载该驱动（建立数据库连接时）。

findings.title: Remote Code Execution in DatabaseTypeService.java
findings.description:
系统允许用户提供任意JDBC驱动文件URL，通过DriverResources.download下载并加载JAR文件，但缺少对JAR文件的验证。攻击者可以提供恶意JAR文件，当系统使用URLClassLoader加载该JAR时，可能执行恶意代码。根据CVE-2022-24861补丁，修复方案是添加validateJar方法验证JAR文件安全性，但当前代码中缺失此验证。

Impact: 高危 - 远程代码执行。攻击者可通过提供恶意JDBC驱动JAR文件URL，在目标服务器上执行任意代码，完全控制服务器。利用条件：1. 攻击者能控制jdbcDriverFileUrl（需要SYS_OWNER权限或通过其他漏洞修改数据库）；2. 系统需要加载该驱动（建立数据库连接时）。

Nodes.Desc: 源点：通过 `getJdbcDriverFileUrl()` 读取外部输入，污点从此进入。代码: `public String resolveDriverClassName(DriverClassNameResolveRequest request) { return driverResources.resolveSqlDriverNam...`

传播点：`public` 经 `resolveSqlDriverNameFromJar()` 处理后并入 `tempFilePath`，污点继续向下游传播。 代码: `public String resolveSqlDriverNameFromJar(String driverFileUrl) { String tempFilePath = "temp/" + UUID.randomUUID() + "....`
汇点：调用 `loadOrDownload(context)` 触发危险操作，污点参数被消费（结果写入 `driverFile`）。 代码: `File driverFile = driverResources.loadOrDownload(context.getDatabaseType(), type.getJdbcDriverFileUrl()); URLClassLoader...`

source_to_sink_claim.reason: verifier supports a path that was already validated during mainflow submission

evidence.analysis: 1. 确认文件存在且代码与描述一致；2. 分析代码流：用户控制jdbcDriverFileUrl → DriverResources下载JAR → URLClassLoader加载JAR → Class.forName执行静态代码；3. 验证缺失安全措施：无validateJar方法，无JAR签名验证，无来源检查；4. 符合CVE-2022-24861漏洞模式：未经验证的JDBC驱动加载；5. 权限控制分析：API端点有@PreAuthorize("hasAnyAuthority('SYS_OWNER')")，但攻击者可能通过数据库注入等其他途径利用
evidence.method: 代码静态分析 + 动态Fuzzing Harness测试 + CVE-2022-24861模式匹配

poc.description: 攻击者提供恶意JAR文件URL，当系统加载该JDBC驱动时执行任意代码
steps: 1. 创建恶意JAR文件，包含恶意静态初始化块的Driver类
2. 将恶意JAR托管在可访问的URL
3. 通过API或数据库修改设置jdbcDriverFileUrl为恶意JAR URL
4. 当系统调用CustomDatabaseConnectionFactory.getConnection()建立数据库连接时，URLClassLoader加载恶意JAR，Class.forName触发静态初始化块执行恶意代码

cve_info.Title: Remote Code Execution in Databasir
cve_info.Description: Databasir is a team-oriented relational database model document management platform. Databasir 1.01 has remote code execution vulnerability. JDBC drivers are not validated prior to use and may be provided by users of the system. This can lead to code execution by any basic user who has access to the system. Users are advised to upgrade. There are no known workarounds to this issue.

CWE.Description: CWE-20: Improper Input Validation

PatchInfo.Message:
fix some security bug (#103)

* fix: use hard-code secret

* feat: add driver class validate

* feat: optimize drvier resource code

* fix:ut failed

cve_info.Title: SQL Injection in DHIS2's in OrgUnit program association
cve_info.Description: DHIS2 is an information system for data capture, management, validation, analytics and visualization. A SQL injection security vulnerability affects the `/api/programs/orgUnits?programs=` API endpoint in DHIS2 versions prior to 2.36.10.1 and 2.37.6.1. The system is vulnerable to attack only from users that are logged in to DHIS2, and there is no known way of exploiting the vulnerability without first being logged in as a DHIS2 user. The vulnerability is not exposed to a non-malicious user and requires a conscious attack to be exploited. A successful exploit of this vulnerability could allow the malicious user to read, edit and delete data in the DHIS2 instance's database. Security patches are now available for DHIS2 versions 2.36.10.1 and 2.37.6.1. One may apply mitigations at the web proxy level as a workaround. More information about these mitigations is available in the GitHub Security Advisory.

CWE.Description: CWE-89: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection')

PatchInfo.Message: Merge pull request from GHSA-52vp-f7hj-cj92

basic_info.title: Code Injection in Jiffle.java
basic_info.description:
Jiffle.java中的BLOCK_COMMENT_STRIPPER正则表达式(第131行)无法正确清理所有类型的块注释。当用户提供的Jiffle脚本包含恶意注释时，由于正则表达式缺陷，恶意内容可能不会被移除，从而进入生成的Java源代码中。该源代码随后由Janino SimpleCompiler编译执行(第530-531行)，导致远程代码执行漏洞。补丁显示开发者完全移除了有缺陷的注释清理逻辑，表明这是一个严重的安全问题。

Impact: 远程代码执行。攻击者可以构造恶意的Jiffle脚本，在服务器上执行任意Java代码，完全控制受影响的系统。漏洞位于Jiffle编译器核心，影响所有使用Jiffle处理用户提供脚本的应用。

findings.title: Code Injection in Jiffle.java
findings.description:
Jiffle.java中的BLOCK_COMMENT_STRIPPER正则表达式(第131行)无法正确清理所有类型的块注释。当用户提供的Jiffle脚本包含恶意注释时，由于正则表达式缺陷，恶意内容可能不会被移除，从而进入生成的Java源代码中。该源代码随后由Janino SimpleCompiler编译执行(第530-531行)，导致远程代码执行漏洞。补丁显示开发者完全移除了有缺陷的注释清理逻辑，表明这是一个严重的安全问题。

Impact: 远程代码执行。攻击者可以构造恶意的Jiffle脚本，在服务器上执行任意Java代码，完全控制受影响的系统。漏洞位于Jiffle编译器核心，影响所有使用Jiffle处理用户提供脚本的应用。

Nodes.Desc: 源点：变量 `script` 通过 `setScript()` 接收外部输入并成为污点源。代码: `public final void setScript(String script) throws it.geosolutions.jaiext.jiffle.JiffleException { if (script == null || ...`
传播点：数据在 `replaceAll()` 调用链中继续传递/变换。代码: `private String stripComments(String theScript) { return BLOCK_COMMENT_STRIPPER.matcher(theScript).replaceAll(""); }`
传播点：`private` 经 `createRuntimeSource()` 处理后并入 `writer`，污点继续向下游传播。 代码: `private String createRuntimeSource(RuntimeModel model, String baseClassName, boolean scriptInDocs) { if (scriptInDocs) {...`

汇点：调用 `createRuntimeSource(model)` 触发危险操作，污点参数被消费（结果写入 `runtimeSource`）。 代码: `String runtimeSource = createRuntimeSource(model, runtimeClass.getName(), scriptInDocs); if (LOGGER.isLoggable(Level.FIN...`

source_to_sink_claim.reason: verifier supports a path that was already validated during mainflow submission

evidence.analysis:
1. 读取并分析Jiffle.java源代码，确认数据流：setScript() → theScript → stripComments() → createRuntimeSource() → SimpleCompiler.cook()
2. 编写Java测试程序验证BLOCK_COMMENT_STRIPPER正则表达式缺陷：正则表达式'(?:/\*(?:[^*]|(?:\*+[^*/]))*\*+/)'无法正确处理包含'*/'的注释
3. 测试证明恶意payload如'/* */ System.out.println("RCE Achieved!"); /* */'清理后变为' System.out.println("RCE Achieved!"); '，恶意代码逃逸
4. 模拟生成的Java源代码包含逃逸的恶意代码，将被Janino SimpleCompiler编译执行
5. 代码中第617-619行显示开发者意识到注释清理问题：'if (scriptInDocs) { throw new RuntimeException("Do no know how to clean the block comments yet"); }'
evidence.method: 动态验证通过编写Java测试代码，模拟有缺陷的正则表达式行为，证明恶意注释可以逃逸清理并进入生成的Java源代码。测试显示正则表达式无法正确处理包含'*/'的注释，导致恶意代码保留。

poc.description: 通过构造包含恶意Java代码的Jiffle脚本，利用有缺陷的注释清理正则表达式，使恶意代码逃逸并进入生成的Java源代码，最终被编译执行
steps: 1. 创建恶意Jiffle脚本：'/* */ System.out.println("RCE Achieved!"); /* */'
2. 调用jiffle.setScript()设置恶意脚本
3. 调用jiffle.compile()编译脚本
4. stripComments()方法使用有缺陷的正则表达式清理注释，但只移除'/* */'和'/* */'，留下'System.out.println("RCE Achieved!");'
5. 清理后的脚本被嵌入生成的Java源代码中
6. Janino SimpleCompiler.cook()编译并执行生成的Java源代码，执行恶意代码

cve_info.Title: Improper Control of Generation of Code in jai-ext
cve_info.Description: JAI-EXT is an open-source project which aims to extend the Java Advanced Imaging (JAI) API. Programs allowing Jiffle script to be provided via network request can lead to a Remote Code Execution as the Jiffle script is compiled into Java code via Janino, and executed. In particular, this affects the downstream GeoServer project. Version 1.2.22 will contain a patch that disables the ability to inject malicious code into the resulting script. Users unable to upgrade may negate the ability to compile Jiffle scripts from the final application, by removing janino-x.y.z.jar from the classpath.

CWE.Description: CWE-94: Improper Control of Generation of Code ('Code Injection')

PatchInfo.Message: Validate Jiffle input variable names according to grammar, escape javadocs when including Jiffle sources in output

basic_info.title: Xss in registerinline.vm
basic_info.description:
在xwiki-platform-core/xwiki-platform-web/xwiki-platform-web-templates/src/main/resources/templates/registerinline.vm文件的第48行，xredirect参数直接输出到HTML属性中，未使用$escapetool.xml()进行转义。攻击者可以构造恶意的xredirect参数，当用户访问注册页面时，恶意JavaScript代码会执行。

Impact: 攻击者可以执行任意JavaScript代码，窃取用户会话cookie、进行钓鱼攻击、篡改页面内容、以用户身份执行操作。虽然这是hidden input字段，但事件处理程序如onmouseover、onfocus等仍然可以触发。

findings.description:
在xwiki-platform-core/xwiki-platform-web/xwiki-platform-web-templates/src/main/resources/templates/registerinline.vm文件的第48行，xredirect参数直接输出到HTML属性中，未使用$escapetool.xml()进行转义。攻击者可以构造恶意的xredirect参数，当用户访问注册页面时，恶意JavaScript代码会执行。

Impact: 攻击者可以执行任意JavaScript代码，窃取用户会话cookie、进行钓鱼攻击、篡改页面内容、以用户身份执行操作。虽然这是hidden input字段，但事件处理程序如onmouseover、onfocus等仍然可以触发。

Nodes.Desc: 源点：变量 `type` 在此接收可控数据并进入污点传播链。代码: `<input type="hidden" name="xredirect" value="$!request.xredirect" />`
汇点：污点数据在此进入危险执行路径。代码: `<input type="hidden" name="xredirect" value="$!request.xredirect" />`

source_to_sink_claim.reason: verifier supports a path that was already validated during mainflow submission

evidence.analysis: 1. 读取文件确认第48行代码存在且未使用$escapetool.xml()转义。2. 编写Python fuzzing harness测试多种XSS payload，确认payload可以成功注入并执行JavaScript。3. 分析显示当xredirect参数包含恶意字符如双引号时，可以提前结束value属性并添加事件处理程序。4. 对比同一文件中第41行正确使用了$escapetool.xml($request.xwikiname)，表明开发者知道需要转义但在第48行遗漏。
evidence.method: 静态代码分析确认缺少$escapetool.xml()转义；动态fuzzing测试确认XSS payload可以突破value属性；手动代码审查显示直接输出用户控制参数；与其他模板对比显示正确转义模式在其他地方使用

poc.description: 反射型XSS漏洞，攻击者可以构造恶意URL诱使用户访问，执行任意JavaScript代码
steps: 1. 攻击者构造恶意URL: https://xwiki.example.com/registerinline?xredirect=" onmouseover="alert(document.cookie)
2. 诱使受害者访问该URL（通过钓鱼邮件、恶意链接等）
3. 受害者浏览器加载页面，渲染恶意HTML
4. 当鼠标经过hidden input字段时，JavaScript代码执行，窃取cookie
poc.harness_code:
import re
import html

def render_registerinline(xredirect_value):
    template = '<input type="hidden" name="xredirect" value="$!request.xredirect" />'
    if xredirect_value is None:
        xredirect_value = ''
    rendered = template.replace('$!request.xredirect', xredirect_value)
    return rendered

# 测试payload
payload = '" onmouseover="alert(document.cookie)'
rendered = render_registerinline(payload)
print(f'Rendered HTML: {rendered}')
# 输出: <input type="hidden" name="xredirect" value="" onmouseover="alert(document.cookie)" />

cve_info.Title: Cross site scripting in registration template in xwiki-platform
cve_info.Description: XWiki Platform is a generic wiki platform offering runtime services for applications built on top of it. In affected versions there is a cross site scripting (XSS) vector in the `registerinline.vm` template related to the `xredirect` hidden field. This template is only used in the following conditions: 1. The wiki must be open to registration for anyone. 2. The wiki must be closed to view for Guest users or more specifically the XWiki.Registration page must be forbidden in View for guest user. A way to obtain the second condition is when administrators checked the "Prevent unregistered users from viewing pages, regardless of the page rights" box in the administration rights. This issue is patched in versions 12.10.11, 14.0-rc-1, 13.4.7, 13.10.3. There are two main ways for protecting against this vulnerability, the easiest and the best one is by applying a patch in the `registerinline.vm` template, the patch consists in checking the value of the xredirect field to ensure it matches: `<input type="hidden" name="xredirect" value="$escapetool.xml($!request.xredirect)" />`. If for some reason it's not possible to patch this file, another workaround is to ensure "Prevent unregistered users from viewing pages, regardless of the page rights" is not checked in the rights and apply a better right scheme using groups and rights on spaces.

CWE.Description: CWE-79: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')

PatchInfo.Message:
XWIKI-19291: redirect parameter is badly handled in register page

  * Fix the typo

basic_info.title: Path Traversal in AbstractSxExportURLFactoryActionHandler.java
basic_info.description:
AbstractSxExportURLFactoryActionHandler的processSx方法使用用户可控的spaceNames和name参数构造文件系统路径，未对路径遍历序列进行过滤。攻击者可以通过构造包含'../'的spaceNames或name参数，使文件写入到导出目录之外的位置，导致任意文件写入漏洞。补丁通过改用文档ID（id）而非用户输入的spaceNames和name来修复此问题。

Impact: 高危漏洞。攻击者可以利用此漏洞将任意文件写入到文件系统的任意位置（受应用程序运行权限限制）。可能导致：1. 覆盖系统关键文件（如/etc/passwd，如果运行权限允许）。2. 写入Web shell实现远程代码执行。3. 破坏系统完整性。4. 结合其他漏洞提升攻击效果。

Nodes.Desc: 源点：通过 `createURL()` 读取外部输入，污点从此进入。代码: `public URL createURL(String spaces, String name, String queryString, String anchor, String wikiId, XWikiContext context,...`

        DocumentReference sxDocumentReference = new DocumentReference(wikiId, spaceNames, name);

Nodes.Desc: 传播点：数据在 `processSx()` 调用链中继续传递/变换。代码: `return processSx(spaceNames, name, queryString, context, exportContext);`
Nodes.code: return processSx(spaceNames, name, queryString, context, exportContext);

Nodes.Desc: 汇点：调用 `format(s)` 触发危险操作，污点参数被消费（结果写入 `targetPath`）。 代码: `String targetPath = String.format("%s/%s/%s", getSxPrefix(), StringUtils.join(spaceNames, '/'), name); File targetDirect...`

source_to_sink_claim.reason: verifier supports a path that was already validated during mainflow submission

evidence.analysis: 1. 确认文件存在且可读。2. 分析createURL方法：接收用户控制的spaces和name参数。3. 追踪数据流：spaces通过legacySpaceResolve.resolve()解析为spaceNames列表，与name一起传递给processSx方法。4. 在processSx方法第131行，spaceNames和name直接用于构造文件路径：String.format("%s/%s/%s", getSxPrefix(), StringUtils.join(spaceNames, '/'), name)。5. 该路径用于创建File对象，调用mkdirs()创建目录，并在其中创建临时文件。6. 未发现任何对'../'等路径遍历序列的过滤或验证。7. 权限检查（checkAccess）只验证用户查看权限，不防止路径遍历。
evidence.method: 静态代码分析结合数据流追踪。通过read_file读取源代码，分析createURL方法的spaces和name参数传递到processSx方法，并直接用于构造文件路径，未进行路径遍历过滤。代码中未发现任何路径规范化或安全过滤措施。

poc.description: 通过构造包含路径遍历序列的spaces或name参数，可以将文件写入到导出目录之外的任意位置。
steps: 1. 调用ExportURLFactory.createURL()方法，action参数为'ssx'或'jsx'（对应SsxExportURLFactoryActionHandler或JsxExportURLFactoryActionHandler）
2. 设置spaces参数为'../../etc'（或包含'../'的任意路径）
3. 设置name参数为'passwd'（或任意文件名）
4. 系统将在导出目录外创建路径：{exportDir}/jsx/../../etc/passwd/，并在此目录中创建临时文件
5. 文件内容为SX（SSX/JSX）资源的内容
poc.payload:
恶意请求示例（概念验证）：
spaces = "../../etc"
name = "passwd"

或

spaces = "Main"
name = "../../../etc/passwd"

实际利用需要调用ExportURLFactory.createURL()方法，该方法由XWiki在导出功能中调用。

cve_info.Title: Path traversal in xwiki-platform-skin-skinx
cve_info.Description: XWiki Platform is a generic wiki platform offering runtime services for applications built on top of it. In affected versions AbstractSxExportURLFactoryActionHandler#processSx does not escape anything from SSX document references when serializing it on filesystem, it is possible to for the HTML export process to contain reference elements containing filesystem syntax like "../", "./". or "/" in general. The referenced elements are not properly escaped. This issue has been resolved in version 13.6-rc-1. This issue can be worked around by limiting or disabling document export.

CWE.Description: CWE-22: Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal')

PatchInfo.Message: XWIKI-18819: It's possible to save pretty much anything anywhere by creating and using an SSX/JSX containing "../" in its reference

basic_info.title: Open Redirect in MyFormAuthenticator.java
basic_info.description:
The application does not properly validate the 'xredirect' parameter before using it in redirect operations after successful authentication, allowing attackers to redirect users to arbitrary external URLs. The vulnerability matches CVE-2022-23618.

Impact: 高危漏洞，实际影响包括：1. 钓鱼攻击成功率提升 - 利用合法域名信任；2. 会话凭证窃取 - 通过恶意重定向获取用户cookie；3. 恶意软件传播 - 重定向到恶意网站；4. 品牌声誉损害 - 滥用平台进行攻击；5. 合规风险 - 违反数据保护法规。

cve_info.Title: Open Redirect in xwiki-platform
cve_info.Description: XWiki Platform is a generic wiki platform offering runtime services for applications built on top of it. In affected versions there is no protection against URL redirection to untrusted sites, in particular some well known parameters (xredirect) can be used to perform url redirections. This problem has been patched in XWiki 12.10.7 and XWiki 13.3RC1. Users are advised to update. There are no known workarounds for this issue.

CWE.Description: CWE-601: URL Redirection to Untrusted Site ('Open Redirect')

PatchInfo.Message:
XWIKI-10309: Check URL domains based on a whitelist (#1592)

Introduce a new property for listing the trusted domains and API to
check an URL against that list and the aliases used in subwikis.

  * Add new property url.trustedDomains in xwiki.properties
  * Add new API in URLConfiguration to retrieve this configuration value
  * Create a new URLSecurityManager responsible to check if an URL can
    be trusted based on this property and on the subwikis configurations
  * Introduce a new listener to invalidate the cache of
    URLSecurityManager whenever a XWikiServerClass xobject is
added/updated/deleted
  * Move URL API implementations to URL default module
  * Add a new property url.enableTrustedDomains as a global switch off the
    checks on domains to avoid breaking behaviours on existing instances
  * Add a constant property in URLSecurityManager to be set in
    ExecutionContext to allow temporary switch off the check for
extensions
  * Use both those switches in DefaultURLSecurityManager to prevent
    performing the check when needed

basic_info.title: Path Traversal in StartupFilter.java
basic_info.description:
OpenMRS StartupFilter中存在目录遍历漏洞，攻击者可以通过构造包含'../'序列的servletPath或pathInfo参数，访问服务器文件系统上的任意文件。该漏洞影响/images和/initfilter/scripts路径的处理逻辑，允许未经验证的用户输入直接用于文件路径构造，最终通过FileInputStream读取文件。CVSS评分9.1 (AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:

Impact: 攻击者可以读取服务器文件系统上的任意文件，包括：
1. 系统敏感文件：/etc/passwd, /etc/shadow, /etc/hosts
2. 应用程序配置文件：WEB-INF/web.xml, 数据库配置文件
3. 源代码文件
4. 日志文件和其他敏感数据
CVSS评分9.1表明这是高危漏洞，可导致敏感信息泄露。

findings.title: Path Traversal in StartupFilter.java
findings.description:
OpenMRS StartupFilter中存在目录遍历漏洞，攻击者可以通过构造包含'../'序列的servletPath或pathInfo参数，访问服务器文件系统上的任意文件。该漏洞影响/images和/initfilter/scripts路径的处理逻辑，允许未经验证的用户输入直接用于文件路径构造，最终通过FileInputStream读取文件。CVSS评分9.1 (AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:N/A:

Impact: 攻击者可以读取服务器文件系统上的任意文件，包括：
1. 系统敏感文件：/etc/passwd, /etc/shadow, /etc/hosts
2. 应用程序配置文件：WEB-INF/web.xml, 数据库配置文件
3. 源代码文件
4. 日志文件和其他敏感数据
CVSS评分9.1表明这是高危漏洞，可导致敏感信息泄露。

Nodes.Desc: 源点：变量 `servletPath` 通过 `getServletPath()` 接收外部输入并成为污点源。代码: `String servletPath = httpRequest.getServletPath();`
源点：通过 `getPathInfo()` 读取外部输入，污点从此进入。代码: `if (httpRequest.getPathInfo() != null) {`
传播点：`File` 经 `File()` 处理后并入 `file`，污点继续向下游传播。 代码: `File file = new File(filterConfig.getServletContext().getRealPath(servletPath));`
传播点：`new` 经 `File()` 处理后并入 `file`，污点继续向下游传播。 代码: `file = new File(file, httpRequest.getPathInfo());`
汇点：调用 `FileInputStream(file)` 触发危险操作，污点参数被消费（结果写入 `imageFileInputStream`）。 代码: `imageFileInputStream = new FileInputStream(file);`

source_to_sink_claim.reason: verifier supports a path that was already validated during mainflow submission

evidence.analysis: 通过读取和分析web/src/main/java/org/openmrs/web/filter/StartupFilter.java文件，确认了完整的source-to-sink路径。代码中：1) 使用httpRequest.getServletPath()和httpRequest.getPathInfo()获取用户输入；2) 直接将用户输入用于文件路径构造，未进行任何规范化或安全检查；3) 使用new FileInputStream(file)读取文件。攻击者可以通过构造包含'../'序列的路径访问服务器上的任意文件。
evidence.method: 静态代码分析，证据链验证

poc.description: 通过构造恶意路径读取服务器上的敏感文件
steps: 发送HTTP请求到OpenMRS应用的/images或/initfilter/scripts路径
在servletPath或pathInfo参数中包含路径遍历序列
例如：GET /images/../../etc/passwd 或 GET /images + pathInfo=/../../etc/passwd
服务器将返回请求的文件内容
poc.payload:
恶意请求示例：
1. GET /images/../../etc/passwd HTTP/1.1
2. GET /images/..%2f..%2fetc%2fpasswd HTTP/1.1 (URL编码)
3. GET /initfilter/scripts/../../WEB-INF/web.xml HTTP/1.1
4. GET /images HTTP/1.1
   Path-Info: /../../etc/shadow
poc.harness_code:
由于Java环境限制无法执行动态测试，但漏洞逻辑清晰：
1. 用户输入 servletPath = "/images/../../etc/passwd"
2. 代码检查 servletPath.startsWith("/images") 返回 true
3. 创建 File 对象：new File(getRealPath("/images/../../etc/passwd"))
4. 执行 new FileInputStream(file) 读取 /etc/passwd 文件

cve_info.Title: Directory Traversal in OpenMRS Startup Filter
cve_info.Description: OpenMRS is a patient-based medical record system focusing on giving providers a free customizable electronic medical record system. Affected versions are subject to arbitrary file exfiltration due to failure to sanitize request when satisfying GET requests for `/images` & `/initfilter/scripts`. This can allow an attacker to access any file on a system running OpenMRS that is accessible to the user id OpenMRS is running under. Affected implementations should update to the latest patch version of OpenMRS Core for the minor version they use. These are: 2.1.5, 2.2.1, 2.3.5, 2.4.5 and 2.5.3. As a general rule, this vulnerability is already mitigated by Tomcat's URL normalization in Tomcat 7.0.28+. Users on older versions of Tomcat should consider upgrading their Tomcat instance as well as their OpenMRS instance.

CWE.Description: CWE-22: Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal')

PatchInfo.Message: Fix bug

basic_info.title: Xss in ZentaoPlatform.java
basic_info.description:
In `ZentaoPlatform.packageDescriptionByPathAndName`, when `path` starts with 'http', it is not URL-encoded and directly embedded into a Markdown image link `![](...)`. If an attacker can control the `path` value (e.g., through user input), they could inject JavaScript code.

Impact: 攻击者可以注入恶意JavaScript代码，当生成的Markdown在前端渲染时可能执行，导致：1) 窃取用户会话cookie 2) 重定向到恶意网站 3) 执行任意JavaScript代码 4) 钓鱼攻击

findings.title: Xss in ZentaoPlatform.java
findings.description:
In `ZentaoPlatform.packageDescriptionByPathAndName`, when `path` starts with 'http', it is not URL-encoded and directly embedded into a Markdown image link `![](...)`. If an attacker can control the `path` value (e.g., through user input), they could inject JavaScript code.

Nodes.code: private String packageDescriptionByPathAndName(String path, String name) {

source_to_sink_claim.reason: verifier supports a path that was already validated during mainflow submission

evidence.analysis: 通过读取代码和运行Java测试验证，确认XSS漏洞存在。当path以'http'开头时，跳过URL编码处理，直接拼接为Markdown图片链接。测试显示：当path不以'http'开头时会被URL编码，相对安全；但当path以'http'开头时，恶意JavaScript代码（如onerror事件处理器）会直接嵌入Markdown，可能在前端渲染时执行。
evidence.method: 代码静态分析 + 动态逻辑验证

cve_info.Title: Server-Side Request Forgery in Metersphere leads to Cross-Site Scripting
cve_info.Description: MeterSphere is a one-stop open source continuous testing platform, covering test management, interface testing, UI testing and performance testing. Versions prior to 2.5.0 are subject to a Server-Side Request Forgery that leads to Cross-Site Scripting. A Server-Side request forgery in `IssueProxyResourceService::getMdImageByUrl` allows an attacker to access internal resources, as well as executing JavaScript code in the context of Metersphere's origin by a victim of a reflected XSS. This vulnerability has been fixed in v2.5.0. There are no known workarounds.

CWE.Description: CWE-918: Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF)
CWE-79: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')

PatchInfo.Message: fix(测试跟踪): 缺陷平台请求转发添加白名单

basic_info.title: Path Traversal in FileSecurityUtils.java
basic_info.description:
The isFileOutsideDir function in FileSecurityUtils.java uses getCanonicalPath().startsWith() to check if a file is outside a directory. According to CVE-2022-23082, this implementation is vulnerable to path traversal attacks.

Impact: 攻击者可能绕过路径安全检查，访问预期目录外的文件。如果此函数用于验证用户上传文件的位置，攻击者可能将文件上传到非预期目录，可能导致目录遍历、任意文件读取或写入。

basic_info.title: Path Traversal in ZipUtils.java
basic_info.description:
Bytecode Viewer v2.10.x 中的 ZipUtils.unzipFilesToPath 方法存在 Zip Slip 漏洞（CVE-2022-21675）。该方法在解压 Zip 文件时，对路径遍历的检查存在缺陷。第 71 行使用 `f.getCanonicalPath().startsWith(destinationDir)` 进行检查，其中 `destinationDir` 参数未经过规范化处理，而 `f.getCanonicalPath()` 返回的是规范化路径。这可能导致检查被绕过，允许恶意 ZIP 文件中的路径遍历攻击。

Impact: 攻击者可以创建恶意ZIP文件，利用有缺陷的Zip Slip检查，将文件提取到任意目录，可能导致：1) 覆盖系统关键文件（如/etc/passwd、/etc/shadow）；2) 在用户目录中植入恶意脚本；3) 提取文件到Web目录实现远程代码执行。

findings.title: Path Traversal in ZipUtils.java
findings.description:
Bytecode Viewer v2.10.x 中的 ZipUtils.unzipFilesToPath 方法存在 Zip Slip 漏洞（CVE-2022-21675）。该方法在解压 Zip 文件时，对路径遍历的检查存在缺陷。第 71 行使用 `f.getCanonicalPath().startsWith(destinationDir)` 进行检查，其中 `destinationDir` 参数未经过规范化处理，而 `f.getCanonicalPath()` 返回的是规范化路径。这可能导致检查被绕过，允许恶意 ZIP 文件中的路径遍历攻击。

Impact: 攻击者可以创建恶意ZIP文件，利用有缺陷的Zip Slip检查，将文件提取到任意目录，可能导致：1) 覆盖系统关键文件（如/etc/passwd、/etc/shadow）；2) 在用户目录中植入恶意脚本；3) 提取文件到Web目录实现远程代码执行。

Nodes.Desc: 源点：变量 `entry` 通过 `nextElement()` 接收外部输入并成为污点源。代码: `JarEntry entry = enums.nextElement();`
传播点：`String` 经 `getName()` 处理后并入 `fileName`，污点继续向下游传播。 代码: `String fileName = destinationDir + File.separator + entry.getName(); File f = new File(fileName);`
Nodes.code:
String fileName = destinationDir + File.separator + entry.getName();
                File f = new File(fileName);

Nodes.Desc: 汇点：调用 `getCanonicalPath()` 触发危险操作，污点在此被利用。代码: `if (!f.getCanonicalPath().startsWith(destinationDir)) { System.out.println("Zip Slip exploit detected. Skipping entry " ...`
汇点：调用 `try(InputStream)` 触发危险操作，污点参数被消费（结果写入 `is`）。 代码: `try (InputStream is = jar.getInputStream(entry); FileOutputStream fos = new FileOutputStream(f)) {`
Nodes.code:
try (InputStream is = jar.getInputStream(entry);
                         FileOutputStream fos = new FileOutputStream(f)) {

source_to_sink_claim.reason: verifier supports a path that was already validated during mainflow submission

evidence.analysis: 读取并分析了src/main/java/the/bytecode/club/bytecodeviewer/util/ZipUtils.java文件的完整unzipFilesToPath方法。检查了第71行的Zip Slip保护逻辑：if (!f.getCanonicalPath().startsWith(destinationDir))。发现该检查存在多个问题：1) destinationDir未调用getCanonicalPath()规范化，而f.getCanonicalPath()已规范化，两者可能不匹配；2) startsWith是简单的字符串前缀匹配，未考虑路径语义，例如'/tmp/test'会匹配'/tmp/test2/evil.txt'；3) 当destinationDir为空字符串时，startsWith('')始终返回true，完全绕过检查。这些缺陷可能被恶意ZIP文件利用进行路径遍历攻击。
evidence.method: 代码静态分析结合逻辑推理验证。分析了unzipFilesToPath方法的实现，发现Zip Slip检查逻辑存在缺陷：1) destinationDir参数未规范化而f.getCanonicalPath()返回规范化路径；2) startsWith是字符串前缀匹配，如果destinationDir不以路径分隔符结尾可能错误匹配；3) 当destinationDir为空字符串时检查完全绕过。

poc.description: 创建一个包含恶意路径条目的ZIP文件，利用有缺陷的检查逻辑绕过Zip Slip保护
steps: 创建一个ZIP文件，包含名为'../../etc/passwd'的条目
如果destinationDir参数为空字符串或未规范化的路径，检查f.getCanonicalPath().startsWith(destinationDir)可能被绕过
恶意文件将被提取到系统敏感位置如/etc/passwd
poc.payload:
恶意ZIP文件结构：
- 条目名: ../../etc/passwd
- 内容: 任意恶意内容

当调用unzipFilesToPath(zipFile, "")或unzipFilesToPath(zipFile, "/tmp/../var")时，检查可能被绕过。

cve_info.Title: Bytecode Viewer v2.10.x Zip Slip
cve_info.Description: Bytecode Viewer (BCV) is a Java/Android reverse engineering suite. Versions of the package prior to 2.11.0 are vulnerable to Arbitrary File Write via Archive Extraction (AKA "Zip Slip"). The vulnerability is exploited using a specially crafted archive that holds directory traversal filenames (e.g. ../../evil.exe). The Zip Slip vulnerability can affect numerous archive formats, including zip, jar, tar, war, cpio, apk, rar and 7z. The attacker can then overwrite executable files and either invoke them remotely or wait for the system or user to call them, thus achieving remote command execution on the victimâs machine. The impact of a Zip Slip vulnerability would allow an attacker to create or overwrite existing files on the filesystem. In the context of a web application, a web shell could be placed within the application directory to achieve code execution. All users should upgrade to BCV v2.11.0 when possible to receive a patch. There are no recommended workarounds aside from upgrading.

CWE.Description: CWE-22: Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal')

PatchInfo.Message: Improve Zip Slip detection

basic_info.title: Ssrf in ProxyServlet.java
basic_info.description:
ProxyServlet 的 checkUrlParameter 方法缺少对 IPv6 地址的检查，特别是 IPv6 link-local 地址 (fe80::/10)。攻击者可以通过构造包含 IPv6 link-local 地址的 URL 参数，绕过现有的安全验证，发起对内部网络服务的 SSRF 攻击。该方法只检查了 IPv4 私有和保留地址，但没有检查 IPv6 地址格式，导致攻击者可以访问本地网络服务。

Impact: 攻击者可以利用此漏洞：
1. 访问本地网络上的内部服务（如数据库、管理界面、API）
2. 绕过网络边界安全控制
3. 扫描内部网络端口和服务
4. 访问云元数据服务（如果目标环境启用 IPv6）
5. 可能进一步利用内部服务漏洞进行横向移动

findings.title: Ssrf in ProxyServlet.java
findings.description:
ProxyServlet 的 checkUrlParameter 方法缺少对 IPv6 地址的检查，特别是 IPv6 link-local 地址 (fe80::/10)。攻击者可以通过构造包含 IPv6 link-local 地址的 URL 参数，绕过现有的安全验证，发起对内部网络服务的 SSRF 攻击。该方法只检查了 IPv4 私有和保留地址，但没有检查 IPv6 地址格式，导致攻击者可以访问本地网络服务。

Impact: 攻击者可以利用此漏洞：
1. 访问本地网络上的内部服务（如数据库、管理界面、API）
2. 绕过网络边界安全控制
3. 扫描内部网络端口和服务
4. 访问云元数据服务（如果目标环境启用 IPv6）
5. 可能进一步利用内部服务漏洞进行横向移动

Nodes.Desc: 源点：变量 `urlParam` 通过 `getParameter()` 接收外部输入并成为污点源。代码: `String urlParam = request.getParameter("url");`
传播点：数据在 `checkUrlParameter()` 调用链中继续传递/变换。代码: `if (checkUrlParameter(urlParam))`
传播点：`public` 经 `checkUrlParameter()` 处理后并入 `parsedUrl`，污点继续向下游传播。 代码: `public boolean checkUrlParameter(String url) { if (url != null) { try { URL parsedUrl = new URL(url); String protocol = ...`
汇点：调用 `URL(urlParam)` 触发危险操作，污点参数被消费（结果写入 `url`）。 代码: `URL url = new URL(urlParam); URLConnection connection = url.openConnection();`
Nodes.code:
URL url = new URL(urlParam);
				URLConnection connection = url.openConnection();

source_to_sink_claim.reason: verifier supports a path that was already validated during mainflow submission

evidence.analysis:
1. 读取并分析 src/main/java/com/mxgraph/online/ProxyServlet.java 文件，确认 checkUrlParameter 方法实现
2. 编写 Java 测试程序复制 checkUrlParameter 方法逻辑
3. 测试多种 IPv6 地址格式，包括：
   - IPv6 link-local 地址 (fe80::1, fe80::20c:29ff:fe11:1111)
   - IPv6 唯一本地地址 (fd00::1, fc00::1)
   - IPv6 环回地址 (::1) - 被正确阻止
   - IPv6 映射的 IPv4 地址 (::ffff:10.0.0.1) - 被正确阻止
4. 测试结果：所有 IPv6 link-local 和唯一本地地址都被允许通过检查（10/10 测试用例通过）
5. 确认漏洞原因为：checkUrlParameter 只使用 hostAddress.startsWith() 检查 IPv4 点分十进制地址，未处理 IPv6 十六进制表示法
evidence.method: 动态代码验证：编写 Java Fuzzing Harness 测试 checkUrlParameter 方法，构造包含 IPv6 link-local 地址 (fe80::/10) 和 IPv6 唯一本地地址 (fc00::/7, fd00::/8) 的 URL，确认这些地址被允许通过安全检查

basic_info.title: Ssrf in cli.js
basic_info.description:
ssrfcheck库v1.1.1版本中的is-private-ip.js文件缺少224.0.0.0/4（组播地址）范围的黑名单条目。根据CVE-2025-8267，这允许攻击者构造指向组播地址（224.0.0.0到239.255.255.255）的URL，绕过SSRF保护机制。PRIVATE_CIDRS数组包含240.0.0.0/4（E类保留地址）但缺少224.0.0.0/4（D类组播地址），导致isPrivateIP函数错误地将组播地址识别为公共地址。

Impact: 攻击者可以构造指向组播地址（224.0.0.0-239.255.255.255）的URL，绕过SSRF保护机制。这可能导致：1. 内部网络探测和攻击 2. 服务发现攻击（如SSDP发现）3. 网络流量放大攻击 4. 路由协议攻击（如OSPF、VRRP）

cve_info.Description: Versions of the package ssrfcheck before 1.2.0 are vulnerable to Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) due to an incomplete denylist of IP address ranges. Specifically, the package fails to classify the reserved IP address space 224.0.0.0/4 (Multicast) as invalid. This oversight allows attackers to craft requests targeting these multicast addresses.

CWE.Description: Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF)

basic_info.title: Open Redirect in SsoController.java
basic_info.description:
在JeeSite up to 5.12.0中，存在开放重定向漏洞。由于配置文件中的`allowRedirects`配置项被注释且值为null（`#allowRedirects: ~`），导致`ServletUtils.isAllowRedirects`方法在`ALLOW_REDIRECTS`为空时默认返回true。同时，`SsoController.sso`方法直接使用用户可控的`url`参数进行重定向，未调用`ServletUtils.isAllowRedirects`进行验证。

Impact: 攻击者可利用此漏洞将已登录用户重定向到恶意网站，用于：1. 钓鱼攻击 - 伪造登录页面窃取凭证；2. 会话劫持 - 通过重定向传递会话令牌；3. 恶意软件分发 - 重定向到挂马网站；4. 声誉损害 - 合法网站被用于恶意重定向。

cve_info.Title: thinkgem JeeSite SsoController.java sso redirect
cve_info.Description: A vulnerability classified as problematic was found in thinkgem JeeSite up to 5.12.0. This vulnerability affects the function sso of the file src/main/java/com/jeesite/modules/sys/web/SsoController.java. The manipulation of the argument redirect leads to open redirect. The attack can be initiated remotely. The exploit has been disclosed to the public and may be used. The patch is identified as 3d06b8d009d0267f0255acc87ea19d29d07cedc3. It is recommended to apply a patch to fix this issue.

basic_info.title: Open Redirect in SiteController.java
basic_info.description:
在modules/cms/src/main/java/com/jeesite/modules/cms/web/SiteController.java的select方法中，redirect参数直接来自用户输入，未经过ServletUtils.isAllowRedirects()验证即用于重定向。由于三个配置文件（jeesite-core.yml、application.yml、web-api/application.yml）中的allowRedirects配置被注释，默认情况下ALLOW_REDIRECTS为空，导致isAllowRedirects()方法返回true，允许任意重定向地址。

Impact: 攻击者可以利用此漏洞构造恶意链接，诱骗用户点击后重定向到钓鱼网站、恶意软件下载页面或进行其他社会工程学攻击。可能造成用户凭证泄露、恶意软件感染等安全风险。

basic_info.title: Css Injection / Class Attribute Manipulation in code.js
basic_info.description:
在lib/handlers/code.js的code函数中，node.lang参数（来自用户输入的markdown代码块语言标识）通过正则表达式`/^[^ \t]+(?=[ \t]|$)/`进行验证，但该验证无法正确检测字符引用（如` `表示空格）。攻击者可以在语言标识中使用字符引用（例如`javascript malicious-class`）绕过空格检测，注入额外的CSS类名。当渲染到HTML时，字符引用被解码为空格，导致单个类名被解析为多个CSS类。

Impact: 攻击者可以注入任意CSS类名，可能导致：1. CSS选择器攻击 - 通过特定类名选择并操纵页面元素；2. 样式操纵 - 改变页面外观、隐藏内容或创建钓鱼界面；3. 与现有CSS/JavaScript代码交互 - 如果页面代码依赖特定类名逻辑；4. 潜在的CSS注入 - 如果类名被用于其他不安全上下文。虽然这不是直接的代码执行漏洞，但可能被用于社会工程攻击或配合其他漏洞。

Impact: 攻击者可以注入任意CSS类名，可能导致：1. CSS选择器攻击 - 通过特定类名选择并操纵页面元素；2. 样式操纵 - 改变页面外观、隐藏内容或创建钓鱼界面；3. 与现有CSS/JavaScript代码交互 - 如果页面代码依赖特定类名逻辑；4. 潜在的CSS注入 - 如果类名被用于其他不安全上下文。虽然这不是直接的代码执行漏洞，但可能被用于社会工程攻击或配合其他漏洞。

Nodes.Desc: 源点：变量 `value` 通过 `code()` 接收外部输入并成为污点源。代码: `export function code(state, node) { const value = node.value ? node.value + '\n' : '' // To do: next major, use `node.la...`
汇点：污点数据在此进入危险执行路径。代码: `if (lang) { properties.className = ['language-' + lang] }`

source_to_sink_claim.reason: verifier supports a path that was already validated during mainflow submission

evidence.analysis: 1. 读取lib/handlers/code.js文件确认漏洞代码存在。2. 分析正则表达式`/^[^ \t]+(?=[ \t]|$)/`的匹配逻辑，发现它无法检测字符引用中的空格（如` `）。3. 编写JavaScript测试代码模拟漏洞函数，测试多种字符引用变体（` `、` `、`	`等）。4. 验证结果显示字符引用成功绕过验证，注入的类名在HTML解码后被解析为多个CSS类。5. 创建完整PoC演示攻击者可以注入任意CSS类名。
evidence.method: 动态代码验证 + 静态代码分析。通过编写Fuzzing Harness模拟漏洞函数，测试字符引用绕过正则表达式验证的能力，确认攻击者可以注入额外的CSS类名。

poc.description: 攻击者可以在Markdown代码块的语言标识中使用字符引用注入额外的CSS类名。例如，使用`javascript malicious-class`作为语言标识，正则表达式匹配整个字符串（因为` `不包含空格字符），生成类名`language-javascript malicious-class`。当渲染到HTML时，浏览器将` `解码为空格，导致类名被解析为`language-javascript`和`malicious-class`两个CSS类。
steps: 1. 攻击者创建包含代码块的Markdown文档，语言标识使用字符引用，如：javascript malicious-class\nconsole.log('test');\n
2. mdast-util-to-hast处理该代码块，调用code函数
3. 正则表达式匹配整个`javascript malicious-class`字符串
4. 生成类名`language-javascript malicious-class`

5. 渲染为HTML：`
...
`
6. 浏览器解码字符引用，将` `转换为空格，最终解析为两个CSS类：`language-javascript`和`malicious-class`

在Markdown代码块中使用以下语言标识：

或

basic_info.title: Crypto Weak in sync.js
basic_info.description:
在pbkdf2 v3.0.9的lib/sync.js中，存在两个关键安全问题：1) 使用create-hmac而不是create-hash，当传入Node.js不支持或未规范化的哈希算法时，可能导致签名伪造；2) 使用Buffer.allocUnsafe创建未初始化内存，当create-hmac失败时，这些未初始化内存可能被返回，泄露敏感信息。根据CVE-2025-6545公告，攻击者可以利用此漏洞进行签名伪造攻击。

Impact: 高危漏洞。攻击者可利用此漏洞：1) 进行签名伪造攻击，如果create-hmac接受弱算法或不规范算法名称；2) 泄露未初始化的堆内存，可能包含敏感信息如密码、密钥等；3) 通过传入特定算法导致无限循环，造成拒绝服务。影响所有使用pbkdf2 v3.0.9的浏览器环境应用。

findings.title: Crypto Weak in sync.js
findings.description:
在pbkdf2 v3.0.9的lib/sync.js中，存在两个关键安全问题：1) 使用create-hmac而不是create-hash，当传入Node.js不支持或未规范化的哈希算法时，可能导致签名伪造；2) 使用Buffer.allocUnsafe创建未初始化内存，当create-hmac失败时，这些未初始化内存可能被返回，泄露敏感信息。根据CVE-2025-6545公告，攻击者可以利用此漏洞进行签名伪造攻击。

Impact: 高危漏洞。攻击者可利用此漏洞：1) 进行签名伪造攻击，如果create-hmac接受弱算法或不规范算法名称；2) 泄露未初始化的堆内存，可能包含敏感信息如密码、密钥等；3) 通过传入特定算法导致无限循环，造成拒绝服务。影响所有使用pbkdf2 v3.0.9的浏览器环境应用。

Nodes.Desc: 源点：变量 `exports` 通过 `checkParameters()` 接收外部输入并成为污点源。代码: `module.exports = function (password, salt, iterations, keylen, digest) { if (!Buffer.isBuffer(password)) password = Buff...`
传播点：`var` 经 `createHmac()` 处理后并入 `U`，污点继续向下游传播。 代码: `var U = createHmac(digest, password).update(block1).digest()`
汇点：调用 `allocUnsafe(keylen)` 触发危险操作，污点参数被消费（结果写入 `DK`）。 代码: `var DK = Buffer.allocUnsafe(keylen) var block1 = Buffer.allocUnsafe(salt.length + 4)`
Nodes.code:
var DK = Buffer.allocUnsafe(keylen)
  var block1 = Buffer.allocUnsafe(salt.length + 4)

Nodes.Desc: 汇点：调用 `allocUnsafe(hLen)` 触发危险操作，污点参数被消费（结果写入 `T`）。 代码: `T = Buffer.allocUnsafe(hLen)`

source_to_sink_claim.reason: verifier supports a path that was already validated during mainflow submission

evidence.analysis: 通过读取lib/sync.js完整源代码，分析数据流：用户控制的digest参数→传递给createHmac→使用Buffer.allocUnsafe分配内存。确认漏洞存在证据：1) 代码中确实使用Buffer.allocUnsafe三次；2) 使用create-hmac模块；3) 存在除零风险：如果U.length=0，则hLen=0，l=Math.ceil(keylen/0)=Infinity，导致无限循环。虽然无法动态执行测试（环境限制），但静态分析确认代码模式与CVE-2025-6545描述完全匹配。
evidence.method: 静态代码分析结合CVE-2025-6545公告验证。通过分析lib/sync.js源代码，确认存在以下漏洞：1) 使用Buffer.allocUnsafe分配未初始化内存（第15、16、28行）；2) 使用create-hmac而非create-hash，算法验证不足；3) 边界情况：如果createHmac返回长度为0的缓冲区，导致hLen=0，进而l=Math.ceil(keylen/0)=Infinity，造成无限循环拒绝服务。

poc.description: 攻击者可以传入无效的哈希算法名称，导致createHmac返回意外结果（如空缓冲区），触发无限循环拒绝服务，或导致未初始化内存泄露。
steps: 1. 在浏览器环境中使用pbkdf2库（通过browser.js加载lib/sync.js）
2. 调用pbkdf2Sync函数，传入无效的digest算法参数
3. 观察是否触发无限循环或返回包含未初始化内存的结果

cve_info.Title: ClipBucket v5: Stored XSS Vulnerability in Manage Playlists
cve_info.Description: ClipBucket v5 is an open source video sharing platform. In versions 5.5.2-#146 and below, the Manage Playlists feature is vulnerable to stored Cross-site Scripting (XSS),specifically in the Playlist Name field. An authenticated low-privileged user can create a playlist with a malicious name containing HTML/JavaScript code, which is rendered unescaped on playlist detail and listing pages. This results in arbitrary JavaScript execution in every viewerâs browser, including administrators. This issue is fixed in version 5.5.2-#147.

CWE.Description: CWE-79: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')

PatchInfo.Message:
Back office : Fix possible XSS injection
Front office : Fix possible XSS injection (Thanks @Takumi142857 !),Fix photo edition from upload form
Miscellaneous : Cleanup code

basic_info.title: Xss in photo_uploader.php
basic_info.description:
攻击者可以通过上传或编辑照片时，在 photo_title 参数中注入恶意 JavaScript 代码。该代码仅经过 mysql_clean() 处理，该函数仅用于防止 SQL 注入，不提供 XSS 防护。恶意标题被存储到数据库，当管理员访问照片编辑页面（edit_photo.php）时，标题在模板中直接输出，未经过 HTML 编码，导致脚本在管理员浏览器中执行。

Impact: 存储型XSS漏洞，攻击者可以注入恶意JavaScript代码，当管理员访问照片编辑页面时执行。可能导致管理员会话劫持、权限提升、网站篡改等。

Nodes.Desc: 源点：变量 `$_POST['photo_title']` 通过 `$_REQUEST()` 接收外部输入并成为污点源。代码: `$_POST['photo_title'] = mysql_clean($_POST['photo_title']);`

source_to_sink_claim.reason: verifier supports a path that was already validated during mainflow submission

evidence.analysis: 1. 确认 mysql_clean() 函数只调用 Clipbucket_db::getInstance()->clean_var($var)，仅用于防止 SQL 注入。2. 确认 display_clean() 函数使用 htmlentities() 进行 HTML 编码，但 photo_title 输出时未使用此过滤器。3. 确认 edit_photo.html 模板中 photo_title 直接输出，未经过 HTML 编码。4. 数据流清晰：用户输入 -> mysql_clean() -> 存储到数据库 -> 从数据库读取 -> 模板输出。

basic_info.title: Xss in index.js
basic_info.description:
In the generatePlaintext method of mailgen package, HTML tags are stripped using a regex replace (line 126) before HTML entities are decoded using he.decode (line 129). If user-controlled input contains encoded HTML entities (e.g., <script>alert(1)</script>), they will be decoded to <script>alert(1)</script> after tag stripping, resulting in HTML tags in the plaintext output. If this output is used in an HTML context, it could lead to XSS.

Impact: 当 generatePlaintext 的输出被用于 HTML 上下文时（例如在管理后台查看邮件内容、在网页中显示纯文本邮件等），可能导致跨站脚本攻击（XSS）。攻击者可以执行任意 JavaScript 代码，窃取会话 cookie、重定向用户或进行其他恶意操作。虽然 generatePlaintext 本意是生成纯文本，但开发者可能错误地将输出用于 HTML 上下文。

findings.title: Xss in index.js
findings.description:
In the generatePlaintext method of mailgen package, HTML tags are stripped using a regex replace (line 126) before HTML entities are decoded using he.decode (line 129). If user-controlled input contains encoded HTML entities (e.g., <script>alert(1)</script>), they will be decoded to <script>alert(1)</script> after tag stripping, resulting in HTML tags in the plaintext output. If this output is used in an HTML context, it could lead to XSS.

Impact: 当 generatePlaintext 的输出被用于 HTML 上下文时（例如在管理后台查看邮件内容、在网页中显示纯文本邮件等），可能导致跨站脚本攻击（XSS）。攻击者可以执行任意 JavaScript 代码，窃取会话 cookie、重定向用户或进行其他恶意操作。虽然 generatePlaintext 本意是生成纯文本，但开发者可能错误地将输出用于 HTML 上下文。

Nodes.Desc: 源点：变量 `body` 通过 `function()` 接收外部输入并成为污点源。代码: `Mailgen.prototype.parseParams = function (params) { // Basic params validation if (!params || typeof params !== 'object'...`
传播点：`var` 经 `parseParams()` 处理后并入 `ejsParams`，污点继续向下游传播。 代码: `var ejsParams = this.parseParams(params); // Render the plaintext theme with ejs, injecting the data accordingly var out...`
汇点：调用 `replace(n)` 触发危险操作，污点参数被消费（结果写入 `output`）。 代码: `// Strip all HTML tags from plaintext output output = output.replace(/<(.|\n)+?>/g, ''); // Decode HTML entities such as...`

source_to_sink_claim.reason: verifier supports a path that was already validated during mainflow submission

evidence.analysis:
1. 读取并分析了 index.js 文件的完整代码。
2. 确认了 generatePlaintext 函数的逻辑：第126行先执行标签剥离，第129行后执行实体解码。
3. 分析了 parseParams 函数，确认用户输入可以通过 params.body 的多个字段（intro, outro, action, table 等）进入系统。
4. 验证了漏洞原理：如果用户输入包含编码的 HTML 实体（如 <script>alert(1)</script>），标签剥离阶段不会移除它们（因为 < 不是 <），随后实体解码会将 < 转换为 <，> 转换为 >，导致 HTML 标签出现在最终输出中。
5. 虽然 generatePlaintext 旨在生成纯文本，但如果输出被误用在 HTML 上下文中（例如在网页中显示邮件内容），就会导致 XSS。
evidence.method: 静态代码分析和逻辑推理。通过分析 generatePlaintext 函数的代码逻辑，确认了标签剥离和实体解码的错误顺序。验证了用户输入通过 parseParams -> ejsParams -> ejs.render 的传播路径。

poc.description: 当攻击者控制 generatePlaintext 的输入参数，并传入编码的 HTML 实体时，这些实体会被解码为 HTML 标签，出现在纯文本输出中。
steps: 1. 攻击者构造恶意输入：params.body.intro = '<script>alert(1)</script>'
2. 调用 mailgen.generatePlaintext(params)
3. 函数内部：ejs.render 将用户输入注入模板
4. 第126行：标签剥离，但 <script> 不被识别为标签（因为 < 不是 <）
5. 第129行：he.decode 将 < 转换为 <，> 转换为 >
6. 输出包含：<script>alert(1)</script>
7. 如果此输出被插入到 HTML 页面中，则执行 JavaScript

cve_info.Title: Mailgen vulnerable to HTML injection and cross-site scripting via plaintext email generation
cve_info.Description: mailgen is a Node.js package that generates responsive HTML e-mails for sending transactional mail. Mailgen versions through 2.0.30 contain an HTML injection vulnerability in plaintext emails produced by the generatePlaintext method when userâgenerated content is supplied. The function attempts to remove HTML tags, but if tags are provided as encoded HTML entities they are not removed and are later decoded, resulting in active HTML (for example an img tag with an event handler) in the supposed plaintext output. In contexts where the generated plaintext string is subsequently rendered as HTML, this can allow execution of attackerâcontrolled JavaScript. Versions 2.0.31 and later contain a fix. No known workarounds exist.

CWE.Description: CWE-79: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')

PatchInfo.Message: index.js: Fix additional HTML injection security issue in plaintext e-mails (thanks @edoardottt)

User-controlled metadata.presenters and metadata.contributors are directly inserted into HTML strings without proper escaping in createElementWithHtmlText calls, leading to cross-site scripting vulnerabilities.

cve_info.Title: Opencast Paella Player 7 vulnerable to Cross-Site-Scripting
cve_info.Description: Opencast is a free, open-source platform to support the management of educational audio and video content. Prior to Opencast 17.8 and 18.2, the paella would include and render some user inputs (metadata like title, description, etc.) unfiltered and unmodified. The vulnerability allows attackers to inject and malicious HTML and JavaScript in the player, which would then be executed in the browsers of users watching the prepared media. This can then be used to modify the site or to execute actions in the name of logged-in users. To inject malicious metadata, an attacker needs write access to the system. For example, the ability to upload media and modify metadata. This cannot be exploited by unauthenticated users. This issue is fixed in Opencast 17.8 and 18.2.

CWE.Description: CWE-79: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')

PatchInfo.Message:
Merge commit from fork

Paella security fix

basic_info.title: Xss in app.js
basic_info.description:
在src/app.js第52行，Helmet中间件配置中显式设置了contentSecurityPolicy: false，完全禁用了内容安全策略。CSP是防止跨站脚本攻击的关键防御机制，禁用它会显著增加XSS攻击的风险。攻击者可以注入恶意脚本并在用户浏览器中执行，可能导致会话劫持、数据窃取等安全问题。

Impact: 禁用CSP移除了对XSS攻击的关键防御层。如果应用中存在XSS漏洞（如未正确转义用户输入），攻击者可以注入并执行任意JavaScript代码，可能导致会话劫持、数据窃取、恶意重定向等安全问题。

cve_info.Title: HAX CMS NodeJs's Disabled Content Security Policy Enables Cross-Site Scripting
cve_info.Description: HAX CMS NodeJs allows users to manage their microsite universe with a NodeJs backend. In versions 11.0.7 and below, the NodeJS version of HAX CMS has a disabled Content Security Policy (CSP). This configuration is insecure for a production application because it does not protect against cross-site-scripting attacks. The contentSecurityPolicy value is explicitly disabled in the application's Helmet configuration in app.js. This is fixed in version 11.0.8.

CWE.Description: CWE-79: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')

PatchInfo.Message: https://github.com/haxtheweb/issues/security/advisories/GHSA-59g8-h59f-8hjp and additional clean up related to https://github.com/haxtheweb/issues/security/advisories/GHSA-9jr9-8ff3-m894

basic_info.title: Command Injection in index.ts
basic_info.description:
Multiple MCP tools in ios-simulator-mcp server contain command injection vulnerabilities due to unsafe shell command construction using string interpolation of user-controlled parameters. The affected tools include: ui_type, ui_tap, ui_swipe, ui_describe_point, and screenshot tools.

Impact: 攻击者可以通过构造恶意输入执行任意系统命令，可能导致：1) 系统文件读取/删除；2) 敏感信息泄露；3) 远程代码执行；4) 服务器完全被控制。由于该服务器可能具有较高的系统权限，影响尤为严重。

findings.title: Command Injection in index.ts
findings.description:
Multiple MCP tools in ios-simulator-mcp server contain command injection vulnerabilities due to unsafe shell command construction using string interpolation of user-controlled parameters. The affected tools include: ui_type, ui_tap, ui_swipe, ui_describe_point, and screenshot tools.

Nodes.Desc: 源点：通过 `string()` 读取外部输入，污点从此进入。代码: `text: z.string().describe("Text to input"),`
传播点：数据在 `async()` 调用链中继续传递/变换。代码: `async ({ udid, text }) => {`
汇点：调用 `execAsync(idb)` 触发危险操作，污点在此触达危险 API。代码: `const { stderr } = await execAsync( `idb ui text ${text} --udid ${actualUdid}` );`

source_to_sink_claim.reason: verifier supports a path that was already validated during mainflow submission

evidence.analysis: 通过读取src/index.ts文件，分析代码发现多个MCP工具（ui_type、ui_tap、ui_swipe、ui_describe_point、screenshot）都存在相同的漏洞模式：用户控制的参数（text、x、y、x_start、y_start、x_end、y_end、duration、type、display、mask等）通过字符串插值直接拼接到shell命令中，然后通过execAsync函数执行。execAsync是child_process.exec的promisify版本，默认使用shell执行命令，使得命令注入成为可能。
evidence.method: 静态代码分析结合数据流追踪，确认用户输入直接拼接到shell命令中执行

3. 观察系统命令'id'是否被执行

cve_info.Title: Command Injection in MCP Server ios-simulator-mcp
cve_info.Description: iOS Simulator MCP Server (ios-simulator-mcp) is a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for interacting with iOS simulators. Versions prior to 1.3.3 are written in a way that is vulnerable to command injection vulnerability attacks as part of some of its MCP Server tool definition and implementation. The MCP Server exposes the tool `ui_tap` which relies on Node.js child process API `exec` which is an unsafe and vulnerable API if concatenated with untrusted user input. LLM exposed user input for `duration`, `udid`, and `x` and `y` args can be replaced with shell meta-characters like `;` or `&&` or others to change the behavior from running the expected command `idb` to another command. When LLMs are tricked through prompt injection (and other techniques and attack vectors) to call the tool with input that uses special shell characters such as `; rm -rf /tmp;#` and other payload variations, the full command-line text will be interepted by the shell and result in other commands except of `ps` executing on the host running the MCP Server. Version 1.3.3 contains a patch for the issue.

CWE.Description: CWE-78: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an OS Command ('OS Command Injection')

PatchInfo.Message:
Merge commit from fork

chore: add command injection protections, document in README.md and SECURITY.md

basic_info.title: Xss in tarteaucitron.js
basic_info.description:
The addScript function in tarteaucitron.js does not validate URL input before setting script.src, allowing attackers to inject javascript: protocol or other malicious URLs. This leads to cross-site scripting (XSS) when the script is loaded.

Impact: High impact XSS vulnerability. Attackers can execute arbitrary JavaScript code in the context of the vulnerable page, leading to session hijacking, credential theft, defacement, or malware distribution. The vulnerability is in a cookie consent library used by many websites, potentially affecting all users of those sites.

findings.description:

Attackers can execute arbitrary JavaScript code in the context of the vulnerable page, leading to session hijacking, credential theft, defacement, or malware distribution. The vulnerability is in a cookie consent library used by many websites, potentially affecting all users of those sites.

传播点：数据在 `function()` 调用链中继续传递/变换。代码: `"addInternalScript": function (url, id, callback, execute, attrName, attrVal) { tarteaucitron.addScript(url, id, callbac...`
汇点：污点数据在此进入危险执行路径。代码: `script.async = true; script.src = url;`

source_to_sink_claim.reason: verifier supports a path that was already validated during mainflow submission

evidence.analysis: 1. Extracted addScript function from tarteaucitron.js and created a test harness to simulate browser environment. 2. Tested multiple malicious URL payloads including javascript:, data:, and vbscript: protocols. 3. Confirmed that addScript accepts javascript:alert(document.domain) and other malicious URLs without validation. 4. Simulated complete attack chain from execJS() -> getAttribute('src') -> getAndParse() -> addScript() -> script.src. 5. Successfully injected javascript:alert('XSS') protocol which would execute when script loads.
evidence.method: Dynamic testing with Fuzzing Harness and complete attack chain simulation

poc.description: URL Scheme Injection leading to XSS via javascript: protocol in tarteaucitron.js
steps: 1. Attacker injects a script element into the page with malicious src attribute
2. Example: <script src="javascript:alert(document.cookie)"></script>
3. When tarteaucitron processes scripts via execJS() function, it retrieves the src attribute
4. The URL propagates through getAndParse() -> addInternalScript() -> addScript()
5. addScript() sets script.src = 'javascript:alert(document.cookie)' without validation
6. Browser loads the script and executes the JavaScript code, causing XSS

cve_info.Title: tarteaucitron.js allows url scheme injection via unfiltered inputs
cve_info.Description: tarteaucitron.js is a compliant and accessible cookie banner. A vulnerability was identified in tarteaucitron.js, allowing a user with high privileges (access to the site's source code or a CMS plugin) to enter a URL containing an insecure scheme such as javascript:alert(). Before the fix, URL validation was insufficient, which could allow arbitrary JavaScript execution if a user clicked on a malicious link. An attacker with high privileges could insert a link exploiting an insecure URL scheme, leading to execution of arbitrary JavaScript code, theft of sensitive data through phishing attacks, or modification of the user interface behavior. This vulnerability is fixed in 1.20.1.

CWE.Description: CWE-79: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')

PatchInfo.Message: Security: check if url attr contain an url and disallow the data-srcdoc attr

basic_info.title: Xss in gifplayer.js
basic_info.description:
The gifplayer jQuery plugin (v0.3.6) contains multiple DOM-based XSS vulnerabilities where user-controlled src attribute values are used without proper sanitization. Attackers can inject malicious JavaScript via the src attribute.

Impact: 攻击者可通过控制img元素的src属性注入任意JavaScript代码，在受害者浏览器中执行。这可能导致会话劫持、敏感信息窃取、恶意重定向等。漏洞在插件默认配置下可利用，需要用户交互（点击图像）。

basic_info.title: Xss in sequence.js
basic_info.description:
在packages/vega-functions/src/functions/sequence.js中的replace函数缺少对pattern参数的验证。攻击者可以传递恶意的RegExp对象，该对象重写了@@replace方法，当调用String(str).replace(pattern, repl)时执行任意JavaScript代码，导致跨站脚本攻击。补丁通过添加isRegExp导入并可能添加类型检查来修复此问题。

Impact: 在浏览器环境中，攻击者可执行任意JavaScript代码，导致跨站脚本攻击(XSS)。可能的影响包括：窃取用户cookie、会话令牌，修改DOM内容，重定向用户到恶意网站，或执行其他恶意操作。漏洞需要攻击者能控制pattern参数传递对象，实际风险取决于Vega表达式语言的使用方式。

evidence.analysis: 验证过程：1) 读取packages/vega-functions/src/functions/sequence.js文件，确认replace函数代码；2) 分析函数逻辑：仅检查repl参数是否为函数，未对pattern参数进行验证；3) 确认导入语句中缺少isRegExp导入；4) 根据JavaScript特性，RegExp对象的Symbol.replace方法可被重写，当调用String.replace()时执行；5) 漏洞需要攻击者能控制pattern参数传递对象，在浏览器环境中构成XSS风险。
evidence.method: 静态代码分析结合漏洞原理验证。通过读取文件内容确认replace函数实现，分析发现：1) pattern参数未经验证直接传递给String.replace()；2) 只检查repl参数是否为函数；3) 如果pattern是恶意RegExp对象且重写Symbol.replace方法，调用String.replace()时会执行恶意代码。

poc.description: 攻击者可创建恶意RegExp对象，重写Symbol.replace方法，当replace函数被调用时执行任意JavaScript代码
steps: 1. 攻击者创建恶意RegExp对象：const maliciousPattern = /test/;
2. 重写Symbol.replace方法：maliciousPattern[Symbol.replace] = function(str, replacer) { /* 恶意代码 */ };
3. 将恶意对象作为pattern参数传递给replace函数
4. 当String(str).replace(pattern, repl)执行时，恶意代码在浏览器上下文中运行

cve_info.Title: Vega vulnerable to Cross-site Scripting via RegExp.prototype[@@replace]
cve_info.Description: Vega is a visualization grammar, a declarative format for creating, saving, and sharing interactive visualization designs. In Vega prior to version 5.32.0, corresponding to vega-functions prior to version 5.17.0, users running Vega/Vega-lite JSON definitions could run unexpected JavaScript code when drawing graphs, unless the library was used with the `vega-interpreter`. Vega version 5.32.0 and vega-functions version 5.17.0 fix the issue. As a workaround, use `vega` with expression interpreter.

CWE.Description: CWE-87: Improper Neutralization of Alternate XSS Syntax
CWE-79: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')

PatchInfo.Message: Merge commit from fork

basic_info.vulnerability_type: Reverse Tabnabbing / Missing rel="noopener" with potential X
basic_info.title: Reverse Tabnabbing / Missing Rel="Noopener" With Potential X in optionparser.js
basic_info.description:
The smartbanner.js library generates HTML links with target="_blank" but without rel="noopener" attribute. This allows the opened page to access the original page's window.opener object, enabling reverse tabnabbing attacks. Additionally, user-controlled input from meta tags is directly inserted into HTML without validation, enabling XSS via javascript: URLs.

Impact: 高危。攻击者可以：1. 通过 javascript: URL 执行任意 JavaScript 代码（XSS）。2. 通过 reverse tabnabbing 劫持原始页面（window.opener.location）。3. 窃取用户敏感信息或会话令牌。4. 重定向用户到恶意网站。

传播点：与变量 `options, optionName` 相关的逻辑保持污点可达性。代码: `options[optionName] = content; }`

传播点：`a` 的值在此参与赋值到 `href`，污点继续传递。代码: `<a href="${this.buttonUrl}" target="_blank" class="smartbanner__button"><span class="smartbanner__button__label">${this....`

source_to_sink_claim.reason: verifier supports a path that was already validated during mainflow submission

evidence.analysis: 1. 确认 src/optionparser.js:24 从 meta 标签读取未经验证的 content 属性值。2. 确认 src/smartbanner.js:129 生成的链接使用 target="_blank" 但缺少 rel="noopener" 或 rel="noreferrer" 属性。3. 确认 src/smartbanner.js:195 将 this.html 直接赋值给 outerHTML，导致 XSS。4. 确认 buttonUrl 值来自用户控制的 meta 标签，可以注入 javascript: URL。5. 使用 pattern_match 工具检测到 HIGH 级别 XSS 漏洞。
evidence.method: 静态代码分析结合模式匹配验证。通过分析数据流从 source (meta.getAttribute) 到 sink (outerHTML)，确认用户输入未经适当验证和编码直接插入到 HTML 中。使用 pattern_match 工具检测到 outerHTML 赋值漏洞。

poc.description: 攻击者可以通过在页面中插入恶意 meta 标签来利用此漏洞，导致 XSS 和 reverse tabnabbing 攻击。
steps: 1. 攻击者在页面中插入恶意 meta 标签：<meta name="smartbanner:button-url-google" content="javascript:alert(document.domain)">
2. SmartBanner 库解析 meta 标签，将恶意 JavaScript URL 存储到 options.buttonUrlGoogle
3. SmartBanner.html getter 将恶意 URL 插入到链接的 href 属性中
4. SmartBanner.publish() 方法通过 outerHTML 将恶意 HTML 渲染到页面
5. 用户点击链接时执行 JavaScript 代码，同时新打开的页面可以通过 window.opener 访问原始页面

cve_info.Title: smartbanner.js rel noopener XSS vulnerability
cve_info.Description: smartbanner.js is a customizable smart app banner for iOS and Android. Prior to version 1.14.1, clicking on smartbanner `View` link and navigating to 3rd party page leaves `window.opener` exposed. It may allow hostile third parties to abuse `window.opener`, e.g. by redirection or injection on the original page with smartbanner. `rel="noopener"` is automatically populated to links as of `v1.14.1` which is a recommended upgrade to resolve the vulnerability. Some workarounds are available for those who cannot upgrade. Ensure `View` link is only taking users to App Store or Google Play Store where security is guarded by respective app store security teams. If `View` link is going to a third party page, limit smartbanner.js to be used on iOS that decreases the scope of the vulnerability since as of Safari 12.1,  `rel="noopener"` is imposed on all `target="_blank"` links. Version 1.14.1 of smartbanner.js contains a fix for the issue.

CWE.Description: CWE-601: URL Redirection to Untrusted Site ('Open Redirect')
CWE-79: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')

PatchInfo.Message: Fix #118 Store link is missing rel="noopener"

cve_info.Title: Lakeus vulnerable to stored XSS via system messages
cve_info.Description: Lakeus is a simple skin made for MediaWiki. Starting in version 1.0.8 and prior to versions 1.3.1+REL1.39, 1.3.1+REL1.42, and 1.4.0, Lakeus is vulnerable to store cross-site scripting via malicious system messages, though editing the messages requires high privileges. Those with `(editinterface)` rights can edit system messages that are improperly handled in order to send raw HTML. In the case of `lakeus-footermessage`, this will affect all users if the server is configured to link back to this repository. Otherwise, the system messages in themeDesigner.js are only used when the user enables it in their preferences. Versions 1.3.1+REL1.39, 1.3.1+REL1.42, and 1.4.0 contain a patch.

CWE.Description: CWE-79: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')

PatchInfo.Message:
Fix stored XSSes via system messages

This commit also fixes the Theme Designer's copy fallback, which would
expose an XSS on malicious user input. This XSS is also fixed in this
commit.

basic_info.title: Xss in LogEntryGrid.js
basic_info.description:
在LogEntryGrid.js的renderJsonValue函数中，第62行的`html.push(data)`直接将未编码的用户可控数据推入HTML数组。data参数来自历史记录的changes字段，该字段存储JSON格式的实体变更数据，包含用户可控字段（如displayName）。当用户查看历史记录变更详情时，恶意数据会被执行。

Impact: 存储型XSS漏洞，攻击者可通过设置恶意displayName注入任意JavaScript代码。当管理员或其他有权限用户查看历史记录变更详情时，代码在受害者浏览器中执行，可能导致：1. 会话劫持（窃取cookie）2. 敏感信息泄露 3. 管理员权限滥用 4. 钓鱼攻击 5. 网站篡改
